Title: Data Scientist (Sales & Marketing Focus)
Description:
Do you have the required Data Science skills to drive real impact at one of the most recognisable brands globally?

You'll contribute to Global Data Science projects to enable business stakeholders from various departments incl. (Sales, Marketing, HR) to make better data-driven decisions. The Data Scientist will work closely with other team members to build and run data products, apply statistical analyses to solve business problems that generate impact, and create convincing presentations to demonstrate said impact to the wider organisation.You'll also be responsible for innovation by introducing new data-driven business ideas, new statistical methods, new data products, or by supporting new business processes.

All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:

DELIVER PROJECTS PART OF EXISTING DATA SCIENCE SERVICE LINES

You will support the team by efficiently managing, running, and delivering Data Science projects with a key focus on our Sales, Marketing and HR stakeholders. This end-to-end approach includes everything from project scoping, execution, quality assurance, and delivery via convincing presentations.

SCALE EXISTING DATA SCIENCE INITIATIVES

You will work together closely with IT colleagues to find efficiencies allowing us to scale our initiatives to more people and more Red Bull markets.

DRIVE INNOVATION

Not focusing exclusively on existing service lines and initiatives, you'll actively think along and propose new ways of generating even more value for our stakeholders.

MANAGE EXTERNAL CONSULTANTS

You'll manage our external colleagues and guide them to deliver Data Science projects in an efficient manner, ensuring top notch quality.

STAKEHOLDER MANAGEMENT

You'll build close relationships with internal and external stakeholders. Thanks to your collaborative attitude and ability to absorb constructive feedback, you'll maximise the likelihood of making each and every Data Science initiative a success for the company.

Support The Data Science Manager With Core Responsibilities

You'll work inside the Data Science Team and will support them with impact tracking, projects, pipeline planning, preparing materials for the planning cycles, internal trainings, onboarding new colleagues, internal and external outreach and more.

Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:


2+ Years of professional experience as a Data Scientist or similar role.
Programming: knowledge and practical experience with both Python and SQL. Snowflake is a plus.
FMCG Knowledge: prior experience working at an FMCG company in a data or analytics focused role a plus.
Data Literacy: ability to prepare datasets ensuring top quality such that essence of said data and the implications for the problem at hand can be grasped quickly.
Statistical Reasoning: applied understanding of Stats and Probability and know how to use these tools to reduce uncertainty in a business context (regression, visualisation).
Technical Literacy: applied understanding of modern computing allows the candidate to do things which go beyond the strict definition of Data Science (git, API calls, web crawling, …).
Data Tooling: experience with version control (e.g., Git), familiarity with data transformation tools (e.g., dbt) and exposure to lightweight application frameworks (e.g., Streamlit, Shiny) is a plus.
Presentation Skills: present coherent data stories at the appropriate level of abstraction given the audience.
Stakeholder Management: good at building mutually beneficial connections with functional stakeholders.
Pragmatic Critical Thinking: intuitively consider relevant costs/benefits in all decisions and act accordingly.
Outcome Driven: highly motivated to add value and to demonstrate that impact to the organisation.
Scientific Reasoning/Scoping: ability to define and formulate new questions, in addition to answering given ones.
Grit: proven capability to see things through to the end even if initial feedback is discouraging.


Due to legal reasons, we are obliged to disclose the minimum salary according to the collective agreement for this position, which is EUR 2,504 gross per month. However, our attractive compensation package is based on market-oriented salaries and is therefore significantly above the stated minimum salary.

As an employer, we value diversity and support people in developing their potential and strengths, realizing their ideas and seizing opportunities. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, skin colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation or origin.

Title: Full Stack Data Scientist
Description:
Are you a Full Stack Data Scientist driven by turning data into tangible business results? Do you want to help organizations become more productive and competitive?

Vuono Group is now looking for Full Stack Data Scientists to join our growing team of experts in Helsinki. Vuono Group is a consultancy that drives business value with processes and AI. We empower Nordic organisations in both the private and public sectors to bridge the gap between business needs and AI capabilities, enabling smarter decision-making, increased operational efficiency, and accelerated growth.

About The Role

As a Full Stack Data Scientist, you are interested in what happens under the hood of modern data solutions and data architectures. You care about data quality, usability and the value it can provide for various business processes. You're experienced with data science and engineering practices, including data observability, implementing MLOps (maybe even LLMOps) workflows and real-time data processing. You understand the intersection of ML/AI systems and data engineering and can build scalable pipelines that support both analytical and operational use cases. Experience with cloud-native data architectures (e.g. Azure, AWS, GCP) is essential.

At Vuono Group, you will get to work in a cross-competence team making our clients' businesses more intelligent with data. In practice, this means building data pipelines, integrating systems together, and utilising ML and AI for insights and operational use cases.

What We’re Looking For


Experience in planning and building production level data solutions that solve real business problems
An analytical mindset and problem-solving skills
Machine learning modeling and/or natural language processing experience
Experience in designing and implementing end-to-end data pipelines that transform raw operational data into business-ready information products
Experience in running and monitoring production workloads
Programming experience in Python and SQL
Willingness and readiness to learn and operate with new technology platforms, tools, whether low code like Celonis or Fabric or pro code like new cloud infrastructure
MSc degree in Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, Data Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science or similar
Professional-level Finnish and English language proficiency


The Following Is Considered a Plus


Interest in continuously learning and applying new technologies and platforms; generative AI, RAG, AI Agents, among others
Experience with various tech stacks, e.g. AWS Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric, DBT, Apache Kafka, Terraform, or similar
Experience in utilising data from business technology platforms, such as ERP, CRM or similar (SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow, etc.)
Experience in transforming data for process and content intelligence purposes
Previous consulting experience


You don’t need to tick every box! What matters most is your drive to make a real impact!

What We Offer

We are building the best work environment for professionals in digital efficiency. To get there, we invest in the well-being and work-life balance as well as the professional development of our people. We operate on trust and transparency rather than titles, fostering a high-autonomy, growth-oriented environment where collaboration, impact, and everyone’s unique thoughts and ideas are valued.

In addition to the usual perks, such as work tools of your choice and extensive healthcare benefits, we also offer our employees the opportunity to invest in our rapidly growing company via an employee share program.

Work with Leading Nordic Companies

At Vuono Group, you’ll collaborate with Nordic clients on a range of challenging digital projects. Our clients include companies like Valmet, Vaisala, Moovy, and SATO. Along the way, you’ll have the opportunity to influence technical decisions, architecture, and how solutions are built. Explore some of our client cases here.

Next steps

We’re always on the lookout for new talent, which is why we recruit on a rolling basis. If this opportunity feels like the right fit for you, take the next step and submit your application! Once we receive your application, we’ll be in touch.

Our recruitment process typically includes at least two interviews, giving you the chance to meet some of our team members and giving us the opportunity to get to know you better: as a professional, a colleague, and a person. Reference checks are also a standard part of our process. We look forward to hearing from you!

Vuono Group is a process AI company. We create superior business processes through data and AI. Our growing team of kind and ambitious people is on a mission to turn AI into real, measurable business impact. Take the next step, explore our open positions and connect with us to find your next opportunity!

Title: Data Scientist
Place: Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
Hver dag sikrer Safe & Secure Operations, at lufthavnen fungerer sikkert og effektivt fra start til slut. Vi har ansvaret for den operative drift på tværs af lufthavnen fra flyoperationer og bagage til infrastruktur, compliance og støttefunktioner.

Du bliver en del af et område med tæt kobling til driften, hvor vi arbejder døgnet rundt for at få tusindvis af rejsende og fly sikkert og rettidigt gennem lufthavnen og skabe en stabil og velfungerende hverdag for passagerer, flyselskaber og samarbejdspartnere.

Om at være Data Scientist

Som Data Scientist får du en central rolle i arbejdet med vores prognosemodeller og ressourcebehov. Modellerne er centrale styringsværktøjer for driften og danner grundlag for planlægning, kapacitet og prioriteringer. Dine analyser omsættes hurtigt til beslutninger med direkte betydning for både den daglige drift og den langsigtede udvikling.

Du arbejder tæt sammen med to kolleger om løbende at udvikle og forbedre modellerne samt styrke beslutningsgrundlaget. Samtidig er vi i gang med at flytte vores setup til DataBricks, hvor du får en vigtig rolle i den videre udvikling.

Du bliver desuden en del af CPH’s fælles datacommunity på tværs af organisationen. Communitiet drives af Digital, som forankrer vores fælles data og platformstandarder. Her får du adgang til sparring, videndeling og et tæt samarbejde med centrale data- og platformsteams, så vi sikrer et fælles teknisk fundament og sammenhængende dataløsninger.

Vi ser frem til, at du bidrager med at:


Tage ejerskab for modeller og prognoser – fra udvikling til implementering
Omsætter komplekse problemstillinger til robuste, beslutningsunderstøttende løsninger
Analysere konsekvenser af ændringer i trafik, processer og produktivitet på kapacitets- og ressourcebehov
Kommunikerer klart og skaber tillid til datadrevne indsigter på tværs af interessenter
Udfordrer eksisterende metoder og bidrager til teamets faglige udvikling


Du har fornøjelsen af et tæt samarbejde med kolleger i Security, Operational Airport Services, Digital, Politiet og Ground Handler, og du er en vigtig sparringspartner i arbejdet med at skabe datadrevne løsninger, der gør en forskel i Nordens største lufthavn.

Om teamet

Teamet består af medarbejdere med kompetencer inden for forecasting, dataanalyse, ressourceplanlægning og udvikling af digitale løsninger. Sammen understøtter teamet den operationelle drift ved at levere beslutningsgrundlag, planlægningsværktøjer og digitale løsninger på tværs af operationen.

Om dig

Du trives i et miljø, hvor data gør en reel forskel. Du motiveres af at arbejde med komplekse datasæt samt at udvikle og vedligeholde prognosemodeller. Du skaber visuelle og letforståelige analyser, som understøtter konkrete beslutninger i driften og bidrager til bedre planlægning og prioritering. Du kommunikerer tydeligt og kan forklare komplekse sammenhænge på en måde, der giver mening for både tekniske og ikke tekniske kolleger.

For at komme i betragtning forventer vi, at du har:


Erfaring med udvikling af modeller til estimering ressourcebehov
Solid erfaring med Machine Learning og statistisk modellering
Stærke kompetencer i Python og SQL, kendskab til Databricks og Power BI er en fordel, men ikke en nødvendighed
Gode samarbejdsevner og lyst til at arbejde tæt med forretningen


Derudover ser vi gerne, at du:


Har en relevant uddannelsesbaggrund, fx matematik, økonomi, ingeniørfag eller lignende
Er nysgerrig, struktureret og trives i et miljø med højt tempo og kort vej til handling


Om os | Hvad tilbyder vi

Du bliver en del af en organisation med en helt særlig puls og et fælles mål om at levere den bedste rejseoplevelse hver dag.

Vi tilbyder et arbejdsmiljø med høj faglighed, stærkt samarbejde og gode muligheder for både personlig og faglig udvikling.

Ud over frokostordning, telefon og it-udstyr tilbyder vi blandt andet:


Gratis parkering og cykelservice
Fysioterapi og træningsfaciliteter
Sundhedsforsikring hvor børn er dækket gratis
Attraktiv barselordning uanset køn


Om ansøgningen | Stig ombord på dit nye job

Vi ser frem til at læse din ansøgning, så send den gerne snarest muligt og senest d. 28. juni 2026.

Vi modtager kun ansøgninger via vores rekrutteringssystem og ikke pr. mail.

Har du spørgsmål til jobbet inden da, kan du kontakte Ali Agha Javed, Senior Manager Analytics på ali.agha.javed@cph.dk.

Vi ønsker at besætte stillingen hurtigst muligt og afholder derfor samtaler løbende, samtidig med at vi tager hensyn til sommerferien og planlægger fleksibelt i forhold til både dine og vores planer.

Læs mere om hvordan det er at være medarbejder hos os på cph.dk/job.

Det er en forudsætning for ansættelse, at du kan blive politigodkendt, ligesom du skal kunne opretholde politigodkendelsen gennem hele din ansættelse.

Derudover er det en forudsætning for at arbejde i Københavns Lufthavne, at du begår dig komfortabelt på dansk- både skriftligt og mundtligt.
Show more
HTML:
Hver dag sikrer Safe & Secure Operations, at lufthavnen fungerer sikkert og effektivt fra start til slut. Vi har ansvaret for den operative drift på tværs af lufthavnen fra flyoperationer og bagage til infrastruktur, compliance og støttefunktioner.

Du bliver en del af et område med tæt kobling til driften, hvor vi arbejder døgnet rundt for at få tusindvis af rejsende og fly sikkert og rettidigt gennem lufthavnen og skabe en stabil og velfungerende hverdag for passagerer, flyselskaber og samarbejdspartnere.

Om at være Data Scientist

Som Data Scientist får du en central rolle i arbejdet med vores prognosemodeller og ressourcebehov. Modellerne er centrale styringsværktøjer for driften og danner grundlag for planlægning, kapacitet og prioriteringer. Dine analyser omsættes hurtigt til beslutninger med direkte betydning for både den daglige drift og den langsigtede udvikling.

Du arbejder tæt sammen med to kolleger om løbende at udvikle og forbedre modellerne samt styrke beslutningsgrundlaget. Samtidig er vi i gang med at flytte vores setup til DataBricks, hvor du får en vigtig rolle i den videre udvikling.

Du bliver desuden en del af CPH’s fælles datacommunity på tværs af organisationen. Communitiet drives af Digital, som forankrer vores fælles data og platformstandarder. Her får du adgang til sparring, videndeling og et tæt samarbejde med centrale data- og platformsteams, så vi sikrer et fælles teknisk fundament og sammenhængende dataløsninger.

Vi ser frem til, at du bidrager med at:

  • Tage ejerskab for modeller og prognoser – fra udvikling til implementering
  • Omsætter komplekse problemstillinger til robuste, beslutningsunderstøttende løsninger
  • Analysere konsekvenser af ændringer i trafik, processer og produktivitet på kapacitets- og ressourcebehov
  • Kommunikerer klart og skaber tillid til datadrevne indsigter på tværs af interessenter
  • Udfordrer eksisterende metoder og bidrager til teamets faglige udvikling

Du har fornøjelsen af et tæt samarbejde med kolleger i Security, Operational Airport Services, Digital, Politiet og Ground Handler, og du er en vigtig sparringspartner i arbejdet med at skabe datadrevne løsninger, der gør en forskel i Nordens største lufthavn.

Om teamet

Teamet består af medarbejdere med kompetencer inden for forecasting, dataanalyse, ressourceplanlægning og udvikling af digitale løsninger. Sammen understøtter teamet den operationelle drift ved at levere beslutningsgrundlag, planlægningsværktøjer og digitale løsninger på tværs af operationen.

Om dig

Du trives i et miljø, hvor data gør en reel forskel. Du motiveres af at arbejde med komplekse datasæt samt at udvikle og vedligeholde prognosemodeller. Du skaber visuelle og letforståelige analyser, som understøtter konkrete beslutninger i driften og bidrager til bedre planlægning og prioritering. Du kommunikerer tydeligt og kan forklare komplekse sammenhænge på en måde, der giver mening for både tekniske og ikke tekniske kolleger.

For at komme i betragtning forventer vi, at du har:

  • Erfaring med udvikling af modeller til estimering ressourcebehov
  • Solid erfaring med Machine Learning og statistisk modellering
  • Stærke kompetencer i Python og SQL, kendskab til Databricks og Power BI er en fordel, men ikke en nødvendighed
  • Gode samarbejdsevner og lyst til at arbejde tæt med forretningen

Derudover ser vi gerne, at du:

  • Har en relevant uddannelsesbaggrund, fx matematik, økonomi, ingeniørfag eller lignende
  • Er nysgerrig, struktureret og trives i et miljø med højt tempo og kort vej til handling

Om os | Hvad tilbyder vi

Du bliver en del af en organisation med en helt særlig puls og et fælles mål om at levere den bedste rejseoplevelse hver dag.

Vi tilbyder et arbejdsmiljø med høj faglighed, stærkt samarbejde og gode muligheder for både personlig og faglig udvikling.

Ud over frokostordning, telefon og it-udstyr tilbyder vi blandt andet:

  • Gratis parkering og cykelservice
  • Fysioterapi og træningsfaciliteter
  • Sundhedsforsikring hvor børn er dækket gratis
  • Attraktiv barselordning uanset køn

Om ansøgningen | Stig ombord på dit nye job

Vi ser frem til at læse din ansøgning, så send den gerne snarest muligt og senest d. 28. juni 2026.

Vi modtager kun ansøgninger via vores rekrutteringssystem og ikke pr. mail.

Har du spørgsmål til jobbet inden da, kan du kontakte Ali Agha Javed, Senior Manager Analytics på ali.agha.javed@cph.dk.

Vi ønsker at besætte stillingen hurtigst muligt og afholder derfor samtaler løbende, samtidig med at vi tager hensyn til sommerferien og planlægger fleksibelt i forhold til både dine og vores planer.

Læs mere om hvordan det er at være medarbejder hos os på cph.dk/job.

Det er en forudsætning for ansættelse, at du kan blive politigodkendt, ligesom du skal kunne opretholde politigodkendelsen gennem hele din ansættelse.

Derudover er det en forudsætning for at arbejde i Københavns Lufthavne, at du begår dig komfortabelt på dansk- både skriftligt og mundtligt.

Title: Data scientist - Machine Learning
Description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.

We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.

Being part of EY in Greece means being part of a continuously growing team, which has been announced as Top Employer for the fourth consecutive year, certified as a Great Place to Work for the third year in a row, and awarded as Best Workplace in Professional Services & Consulting for the second consecutive time, for our almost 3,000 professionals!

At EY, we’ll develop you with future-focused skills and equip you with world-class experiences through coaching and training programs as well as the use of advanced technology and AI. We’ll fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams

Join us as we commemorate 100 years of EY in Greece this year. Experience great flexibility under our hybrid operating model across our offices in Athens, Patras, Thessaloniki and Crete and contribute to building a better working world.

The opportunity

We are currently seeking highly motivated people for our Consulting practice, which is a leading provider of services to financial industry and large corporate clients of all industries. Being part of our AI & Data team, you will work with multi-disciplinary teams across the entire EMEIA region to support global clients.

Your Key Responsibilities

You will identify appropriate modeling techniques to answer the most critical business questions and use your analysis to infer well substantiated business insights in support of your clients’ decision making. To do that, you will use clients’ in-house data as well as appropriate external data-sources.

You will also resort to various data management and visualization techniques to provide insight into the data. Your portfolio of skills covers a wide range of advanced statistical and machine learning techniques for classification, prediction, recommendation, clustering, forecasting, as well as data management, data visualization, and optimization, applied in a commercial context.

You will build valued relationships with external clients and internal peers and contribute to the development of a portfolio of business by focusing on high-impact opportunities. You will contribute to presentations of modeling results and project proposals. Bringing experience and unique insight on one or more industry, you will use your knowledge and experience to shape solutions to client problems.

To qualify for the role you must have


Solid academic background, including at minimum a master degree in Data Science, Business Analytics, Statistics, Mathematics, Econometrics, Engineering, Operational Research, Computer Science, or other related field with strong quantitative focus
Previous working or related research experience (evidenced by PhD and/or relevant publications, awards, or completed project credentials) preferably in a commercial/industrial context
Hands on development experience with Python or related statistical software package including programming skills in building and deploying machine learning models (supervised & unsupervised, time series) and mathematical programming algorithms in supervised, unsupervised and semi-supervised learning techniques
Good understanding of machine learning, predictive modeling and optimization algorithms
Good understanding of data modeling and evaluation
Experience in designing, building, testing and validating highly customized statistical models using diverse statistical and other quantitative techniques
Exposure in scalable big data based advanced analytics software will be considered
Strong written and verbal communication, presentation, client service and technical writing skills in English for both technical and business audiences
Strong analytical, problem solving and critical thinking skills
Ability to work under tight timelines and parallel project deliveries
Ability/flexibility to travel and work abroad for international projects


What We Look For

What’s most important is that you’re dedicated to working with your colleagues as part of a high-performing team. You’ll need to demonstrate enthusiasm, high motivation and passion to develop fast in a multinational working environment. You’ll need to thrive in picking up new skills and talents as you go, so natural curiosity, a lot of questions and the confidence to speak up when you see something that could be improved are essential. If you’ve got the right combination of technical knowledge and communication skills, this role is for you.

What We Offer You

Ability to Shape your Future with Confidence by:


Developing your professional growth:
You'll have unlimited access to educational platforms, EY Badges and EY Degrees, alongside support for certifications. You will experience personalized coaching and feedback, and gain exposure to international projects, through our expansive global network, empowering you to define and achieve your own success.
Dive into our innovative GenAI ecosystem, designed to enhance your EY journey and support your career growth. These advanced AI tools will empower you to focus on higher-value work and meaningful interactions, enriching your professional experience like never before.
Empowering your personal fulfilment: We focus on your financial, social, mental and physical wellbeing.
Our competitive rewards package, depending on your experience, includes cutting-edge technological equipment, ticket restaurant vouchers, a private health and life insurance scheme, income protection and an exclusive EY benefits club card that provides a wide range of discounts, offers and promotions.
Our flexible working arrangement (hybrid model) is defined based on your own preferences and team’s needs, and we enjoy various getaways such as short Fridays, Flex Day and Together Day.
Our commitment to a sustainable way of operating, encourages volunteerism, promotes sustainable practices and offers opportunities for you to create a positive societal impact.
Our pride lies in working at EY as one of the most recognized employers in Greece through our multiple awards received over the last 4 years (Top Employer, Great Place to Work and Best Workplace in Professional Services & Consulting).
Fueling an inclusive culture: We prioritize a diverse, equitable and inclusive environment, where you’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.


Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.

To help create an equitable and inclusive experience during the recruitment process, please inform us as soon as possible about any disability-related adjustments or accommodations you may need.

EY | Building a better working world

EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.

Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.

EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
På B3 Indes förvandlar vi data till värdefulla insikter som driver förändring och innovation. Vi skapar lösningar inom AI, Business Intelligence, Data Science och Automation för att maximera värdet av data och stärka företags konkurrenskraft. Vår styrka ligger i att kombinera passion för AI och data med en stark laganda, där vi stöttar varandra och löser utmaningar tillsammans.

Rollen som Data Scientist på B3

Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med några av Sveriges mest spännande kunder och projekt. Vad innebär det? Jo, att du får:


Gräva i data och hitta insikter som inte bara hjälper våra kunder – utan kanske till och med gör världen lite bättre.
Göra företag mer datadrivna och smartare genom att guida dem i rätt riktning.
Bygga och implementera avancerade lösningar – och faktiskt se dem göra skillnad!


Här handlar det inte bara om teknik – det handlar om att skapa verklig förändring. Vi gillar att tänka stort, experimentera och lösa kluriga problem tillsammans. Och det bästa? Du får ett team av grymma kollegor att bolla idéer med, lära dig av och ha kul ihop med!

Det är din passion för AI och data som gör skillnaden. Utöver det ser vi gärna:


Har du en universitetsutbildning inom matematik eller statistik? Toppen! Har du kanske skaffat motsvarande kunskaper genom arbetslivserfarenhet? Det funkar lika bra!
Minst 4 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet – vi letar efter någon som har hunnit samla på sig en del erfarenhet inom området.
Flytande svenska och engelska – eftersom båda språken används dagligen i arbetet.
Tidigare konsultroller är ett plus! Har du jobbat som konsult tidigare? Då är det en extra merit, men inget krav.


Men framför allt...

Har du erfarenhet av Machine Learning och Python? Grymt – det är värdefullt! Men vi lägger också stor vikt vid din förmåga att se helheten, skapa användbara lösningar men framförallt att du är nyfiken. Om du dessutom har koll på A/B-testning, modellering eller visualisering, är det ett plus – men absolut inget krav.

Varför välja B3 Indes?

💡 Utveckling & karriär – Väx i en entreprenörsdriven miljö där din kompetens får ta plats.

🌿 Balans & välmående – Vi värnar om ditt välbefinnande med stöd för wellness och en flexibel vardag.

🚀 Energi & gemenskap – Här präglas kulturen av öppenhet, nyfikenhet och en passion för att skapa något större – tillsammans.

❤️ Vi bryr oss – på riktigt – Vi engagerar oss i samhällsfrågor och samarbetar med initiativ som Suicide Zero, My Dream Now och Pink Programming för att göra skillnad även utanför arbetslivet.

En arbetsplats som gör skillnad:

Vi är stolta över att ha utsetts till ett av Sveriges fem främsta karriärföretag 2025 – en utmärkelse som speglar vår energi, nyfikenhet och vårt engagemang för att skapa en inkluderande och inspirerande arbetsplats. Här värdesätts olika perspektiv och idéer, och vi tror att det är just det som gör oss starkare.

Hos oss får du friheten att styra över dina uppdrag, din arbetstid och din utveckling. Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga löner, flexibilitet att forma din vardag och en sund balans mellan jobb och fritid. Och vi vet att gemenskap är minst lika viktigt som teknik – därför satsar vi på allt från konferensresor och sommarfester till sköna AW:s där vi kan släppa jobbet för en stund.

Om B3 Consulting Group

B3 Consulting Group är ett expansivt konsultbolag med cirka 1000 medarbetare. Vi brinner för innovation och hjälper Sveriges ledande företag och organisationer att skapa framtidens möjligheter genom digital transformation. B3 finns på tolv orter i Sverige samt i Polen, med huvudkontor i Stockholm. Bolaget grundades 2003, är noterat på Nasdaq Stockholm Small Cap och omsatte 1 141 MSEK 2023.

Vi är stolta över vår prisbelönta företagskultur, där olikheter, erfarenheter och gemensam energi värdesätts. Som ett etiskt och transparent bolag strävar vi efter att ha en positiv påverkan på samhället, människor och miljön. Vi är även engagerade i Women in Tech och initiativ för att stärka AI-utbildning för kvinnor. 2024 utsågs vi till Årets Employer Branding-företag, och vår HR-chef vann titeln Årets HR-chef.

Är du redo att bli en del av ett företag där din passion för AI och data kan göra skillnad? Läs mer om oss och våra möjligheter här!

Title: AI & Data - Data Science & AI - Senior Consultant
Description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.

We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.

Join EY and help to build a better working world.

General Information

Location: Ireland - Dublin / Cork / Limerick / Galway

Available for Work Visa Sponsorship: No

Business Area: UKI AI & Data

Contract Type: Full-Time – Permanent

EY exists to build a better working world, we empower our people by offering the culture, tech, teams, scale, challenges, learning, and the relationships for you to personalise and build your career, helping to create long-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.

This role can be located in our offices across the Republic of Ireland, working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

The Team and the opportunity

As part of our Data Analytics and AI team, the Data Scientist & AI role is pivotal in enabling our clients to derive significant value from their information assets. Through collaboration and domain expertise, our team embeds innovative data analytics solutions into existing business areas, transforming data into strategic assets. We are looking for a Data Scientist who is passionate about leveraging data to solve complex problems and drive business outcomes.

You will play a key role in driving growth by developing new and existing client relationships and delivering first-class customer experience on high-profile engagements.

The Data Analytics and AI team serve as trusted advisors, both practical and innovative, to embed innovative data analytics solutions into existing business areas and transforming data into strategic assets.

Working across all industries, you’ll develop your career by communicating creative, strategic goals both internally and externally. As a Senior Consultant, the opportunity to assess and improve our clients’ reporting policies and corporate governance processes will impact these ever-challenging areas during transformational and regulatory changes.

Your Key Responsibilities


Big Data Analysis: The capability to analyse large and complex datasets to extract actionable insights. Your analytical skills will be key in identifying trends, patterns, and anomalies that can inform business strategies.
Statistical Modeling: The ability to applying statistical techniques to extract insights, build predictive models, interpret data, and support data driven decision making.
Machine Learning and AI Model End to End Management: The ability to build and manage the full lifecycle of ML models including development, validation, deployment, and monitoring in production environments.
Collaboration: The ability to work closely with cross-functional teams to develop, test, and deploy advanced machine learning models, ensuring alignment with business objectives and seamless integration into client operations.
Communication: The skill to effectively communicate complex analytical findings and model results to stakeholders, translating data-driven insights into business language that informs decision-making.
Continuous Learning: The ability to stay informed of the latest advancements in data science, including techniques and tools, to ensure our team remains at the cutting edge of the field.


To qualify for the role, you must have


Experience: 3 years of hands-on experience in building and deploying machine learning or deep learning models in real-world applications.
Technical Expertise: Proficiency in Python, SQL, and deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow and PyTorch.
Programming: Solid experience in Python and SQL Experience with R is a nice-to-have.
ML and AI: Practical experience using ML modeling libraries like Scikit-Learn, Keras, Tensorflow, PyTorch and similar
Generative AI: Some hands-on experience with LLMs for prompt engineering or agents is preferred
Cloud Expertise: Building, deploying and monitoring models on cloud like Azure, AWS or GCP is preferred.
Foundational Knowledge: A strong foundation in statistics, mathematics, AI principles and programming is essential for success in this role.


Ideally, you will also have


Problem-Solving: Ability to translate business assumptions and rules into feature engineering and model explainability, addressing business problems with data-driven solutions.
Collaborative Development: Work under the guidance of senior data scientists and solution architects to build models that align with strategic visions and client needs.
Data Pipeline Management: Be able to design, implement, and maintain data pipelines that are critical for model training and deployment. Your expertise will ensure the reliability and efficiency of our data infrastructure.


What Working At EY Offers

We offer a competitive remuneration package. Our comprehensive Total Rewards package includes support for flexible working and career development, and with FlexEY you can select benefits that suit your needs, covering holidays, health and well-being, insurance, savings and a wide range of discounts, offers and promotions. Plus, we offer:


Support and coaching from some of the most engaging colleagues around
Opportunities to develop new skills and progress your career
The freedom and flexibility to handle your role in a way that’s right for you


All our employees are given a benefits package which they can tailor to suit their individual preferences. Our range of benefits include:


Pension
Discounted health insurance
Web Doctor - Free unlimited online GP consultations for you and your family
The purchase of additional annual leave
Hybrid Working
Free Gym membership
Travel Pass
Maternity & Paternity leave
Bike to work Scheme
Recognition Awards
Cash incentives for referrals
Work Mobile
TECH MBA paid by EY
Wellness rooms Available in some offices


EY is committed to being an inclusive employer and we are happy to consider flexible working arrangements. We strive to achieve the right balance for our people, enabling us to deliver excellent client service whilst allowing you to build your career without sacrificing your personal priorities. While our client-facing professionals can be required to travel regularly, and at times be based at client sites, our flexible working arrangements can help you to achieve a lifestyle balance.

Career Progression


When you join EY, you will be supported to ensure that you are enhancing your skills from day one.
Continuous learning, where you can develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.
As you grow and develop here, you’ll discover opportunities to help customise your career journey, so that it’s as unique as you are - success is defined by you, we will provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a meaningful impact, your way.
Transformative leadership, we will give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the world needs.
Diverse and inclusive culture, you will be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.
We have embraced Hybrid working at EY adding greater flexibility and autonomy to the roles of our employees.


About EY

As a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction and advisory services, we’re using the finance products, expertise and systems we’ve developed to build a better working world. That starts with a culture that believes in giving you the training, opportunities and creative freedom to make things better. Whenever you join, however long you stay, the exceptional EY experience lasts a lifetime.

Inclusion & Diversity

We hold a collective commitment to foster an environment where all differences are valued and respected, practices are equitable and everyone experiences a sense of belonging: Inclusion, diversity, and equity are part of who we are at EY. We believe that the highest-performing teams maximize the power of different perspectives and backgrounds. These teams are both diverse and inclusive and are willing to invite and learn from other perspectives. Our ability to include various viewpoints into our mindsets, behaviours and operations is fundamental to driving innovation, building strong relationships, and delivering the best solutions for our clients.

We recognise the strength that comes from having a diverse workforce and building a culture where we support all our people to achieve their potential. You’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.

As an equal opportunities’ employer, we welcome applications from people of all backgrounds. Reasonable accommodations are offered at every stage of our recruitment process.

Title: Data Scientist - Anti-cheat
Description:
The Anti-Cheat team at Embark comprises a set of disparate but complementary disciplines, including game security development, internal tooling, backend- and data engineering, and data analytics/machine learning. Most of us work across more than one of these domains. Being a core function supporting all of Embark games, we collaborate with many different stakeholders throughout the organisation, such as game teams, legal and community management.

As a Data Scientist/Data Engineer in the Anti-Cheat team at Embark Studios you will be part of a small, cross-functional team with a mission to keep Embark games fair and safe from cheating and exploiting. In this role you will use your skills and experience to prevent and detect malicious and cheating behavior, as well as strategically driving our efforts for using data to become smarter and better within the anti-cheat function.

You’ll be working closely with other data scientists and data engineers within Embark to continuously improve our data foundation, and on top of that assess telemetry and work together with game-, backend-, and ML teams.

You are likely curious to learn new skills, and enjoy working autonomously and taking initiatives while also collaborating within and across teams. Your passion for data, technology and games is what is driving you to great success. By being creative and experimental you aim to solve problems in a game-changing way.

Example Of Responsibilities


Work closely with stakeholders and game teams to scope and design anti-cheat measures.
Perform ad-hoc investigations into suspicious patterns and gameplay behavior.
Contribute to the team with your mathematical skills and modeling abilities.
Research and develop anti-cheat metrics and performance indicators.
Design, develop, and monitor ML solutions.
Extract, analyze and communicate insights from gameplay data.
Integrate and ingest data from third party services.
Build ETL’s, data pipelines and data products.



We would love if you have


A creative and curious mind.
Strong proficiency in SQL and experience with database querying, preferably using tools such as BigQuery
Proficiency in Python.
Experience working with Google Cloud Platform.
Experience working with ETLs and data pipelines.
Experience in predictive modeling and analysis over large datasets
Professional English communication skills.
Experience and/or interest in games and anti-cheat will be considered a bonus!



At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.

We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.

Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.

Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
By clicking the “Apply” button, I understand that my employment application process with Takeda will commence and that the information I provide in my application will be processed in line with Takeda’s Privacy Notice and Terms of Use. I further attest that all information I submit in my employment application is true to the best of my knowledge.

Job Description:

The Future Begins Here: At Takeda, we are creating a future-ready organization that uses data and digital to meet the needs of patients, our people, and the planet. We need your help to make this happen. Join our Innovation Capability Center (ICC): in Bratislava, Slovakia.

At Takeda’s ICC we Unite in Diversity :Takeda is committed to creating an inclusive and collaborative workplace, where individuals are recognized for their backgrounds and the abilities they bring to our company. We are continuously improving our collaborators’ journey in Takeda, and we welcome applications from all qualified candidates. Here, you will feel welcomed, respected, and valued as an important contributor to our diverse team.

THE OPPORTUNTY:

We’re looking for a Data Scientist to turn pharmaceutical manufacturing data into actionable insights. You’ll develop AI/ML models, predictive monitoring tools, and AI-enabled digital twins that optimize processes and ensure high product quality. At Takeda, you will work on cutting-edge AI/ML applications that directly impact product performance, quality and patient supply. You will collaborate in a forward-thinking, innovative environment and see your models make real-world impact on manufacturing processes.

RESPONSIBILITIES :


Build and deploy AI/ML models for forecasting, anomaly detection, and process optimization.
Write testable, versioned, packaged and clean Python code. Unit/integration testing; CI/CD (GitHub Actions/SonarQube) to Databricks jobs or containerized services; observability (logging/metrics/traces) and model monitoring and re-training.
Work with manufacturing and laboratory datasets and handle continuous data through applying time-series analysis and signal processing.
Collaborate with manufacturing science engineers, scientists, and IT to integrate models into workflows.
Create dashboards and visualizations to communicate insights to stakeholders.


SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS:

Education Requirements:


Bachelor’s or Master’s in Data Science, Computer Science, or STEM (Chemical/Biochemical Engineering a plus).
Strong ML/AI experience (Classical ML KNN, SVM, Random Forest/GBMs etc.). Deep learning CNNs/RNNs/GRU, autoencoders, Backprop/Autodiff
Time-series and signal processing expertise; experience with noisy/high-dimensional data ( state‑space/Kalman, spectral methods, autoregressive model, change point control)
Python and SQL proficiency; experience with MLOps platforms (Databricks, MLflow, AWS).
Strong communication skills to convey insights to technical and non-technical audiences.


Desired Skills :


Experience with pharma, biotech, or chemical manufacturing datasets.
Familiarity with workflow automation/orchestration tools (Airflow, n8n) and cloud deployment (Docker, Kubernetes, Azure ML, AWS Sagemaker).


WHAT TAKEDA CAN OFFER YOU:

At Takeda, you may build your career, while contributing to better people’s lives. Expect trust driven culture built around Integrity, Fairness, Honesty, and Perseverance. Joining ICC will give you access to high end technology, training and colleagues who will support your growth.

Salary :As a motivated employee, you should be compensated appropriately. The minimum salary for this position is € 3.083,33 per month (full time), but your final remuneration package may be higher depending on your qualifications and experience.

Benefits :Here are a few benefits our employees are enjoying at Takeda. To get a full picture of what we are offering, follow this link.


Cafeteria
Medical - High standard medical care
Bridge days
Summer Hours
Multisport Card

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
About Us

Allianz Partners is part of Allianz Group and offers B2B2C solutions in the lines of business Travel, Assistance, Mobility & Health. Allianz Partners supports its clients by providing global integrated insurance & service solutions for their customers and employees, based on a deep understanding of the business partners’ value chain. Our ambition is to set the global B2B2C market standard for liaising with global business partners to develop integrated solutions combining insurance, assistance and technology.

In order to support the ambitious growth & profitability targets, Allianz Partners has launched an initiative to enhance our data analytics and AI capabilities. As part of this initiative a team is developing state-of-the-art data-driven solutions across Health Line of business, especially focusing on the underwriting area, in close cooperation with the respective subject matter experts. We are looking for a data scientist with high expertise in data analytics and in machine learning.

What You Do


Utilize your expertise in Python, SQL, and relevant data science libraries to analyze and manipulate data effectively
Build and optimize data and analytics pipelines, with a focus on scalability and efficiency
Apply state-of-the-art data science methodologies and machine learning techniques to solve complex business problems, in particular in Underwriting and Pricing Area
Develop and maintain advanced PowerBI dashboards and reports using DAX functions and complex data modeling
Develop, test and deploy models of analytical work to production environment utilizing GitHub and established workflows for version control, collaboration, and code management
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into actionable business strategies
Communicate findings and insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders through clear and concise presentations.
Meet project deadlines and deliverables with a strong commitment to quality and accuracy
Prospectively:

Explore the use of LLMs in underwriting and pricing
Leveraging cloud platforms like AWS or Azure to manage and analyze large datasets.

AI Readiness Work effectively in an environment shaped by artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning, data, analytics and cloud-based tools, using insights responsibly with our standards of data governance, security and ethical use.


What You Bring

We encourage you to apply even if you do not meet all requirements below.


Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or related field
Proficiency in Python and SQL, including experience with popular frameworks such as tensorflow, , PyTorch, sklearn, and SQLAlchemy.
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft PowerBI including complex DAX formula creation and optimization, data modeling and relationship management, custom visualizations and dashboard design
Proficiency in SQL and, ideally also, NoSQL databases.
Experience with GitHub and established workflows for version control and collaboration.
Strong understanding of machine learning (ML) and statistical techniques, with a track record of developing and ideally deploying ML models.
Knowledge of deep learning and neural networks
Willingness to take over responsibility, develop concepts and drive models into implementation.
Experience in working with agile methodologies in a fast-paced, dynamic, and international environment.
Intercultural sensitivity and international experience.
Highly developed interpersonal skills (i.e., communication, presentation, and negotiation also with non-technical audiences).

Ability to drive projects with various business stakeholders independently


Additionally Preferred Qualifications


Experience with cloud-based ML platforms (Azure ML, AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform)
Familiarity with MLOps practices and model deployment
Understanding of the LLMs concepts and their application


What We Offer

Our employees play an integral part in our success as a business. We appreciate that each of our employees are unique and have unique needs, ambitions and we enjoy being a part of their journey.

We are there to empower and encourage you with your personal and professional development ensuring  that you take control by offering a large variety of courses and targeted development programs. All that in a global environment where international mobility and career progression are encouraged.

Caring for your health and wellbeing is key priority for us. This is why we build Work Well programs to providing you with peace of mind and give the flexibility in planning and arranging for a better work-life balance.

About Us

Allianz Partners is part of Allianz Group and offers B2B2C solutions in the lines of business Travel, Assistance, Mobility & Health. Allianz Partners supports its clients by providing global integrated insurance & service solutions for their customers and employees, based on a deep understanding of the business partners’ value chain. Our ambition is to set the global B2B2C market standard for liaising with global business partners to develop integrated solutions combining insurance, assistance and technology.

In order to support the ambitious growth & profitability targets, Allianz Partners has launched an initiative to enhance our data analytics and AI capabilities. As part of this initiative a team is developing state-of-the-art data-driven solutions across Health Line of business, especially focusing on the underwriting area, in close cooperation with the respective subject matter experts. We are looking for a data scientist with high expertise in data analytics and in machine learning.

What You Do

  • Utilize your expertise in Python, SQL, and relevant data science libraries to analyze and manipulate data effectively
  • Build and optimize data and analytics pipelines, with a focus on scalability and efficiency
  • Apply state-of-the-art data science methodologies and machine learning techniques to solve complex business problems, in particular in Underwriting and Pricing Area
  • Develop and maintain advanced PowerBI dashboards and reports using DAX functions and complex data modeling
  • Develop, test and deploy models of analytical work to production environment utilizing GitHub and established workflows for version control, collaboration, and code management
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into actionable business strategies
  • Communicate findings and insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders through clear and concise presentations.
  • Meet project deadlines and deliverables with a strong commitment to quality and accuracy
  • Prospectively:
    • Explore the use of LLMs in underwriting and pricing
    • Leveraging cloud platforms like AWS or Azure to manage and analyze large datasets.
  • AI Readiness Work effectively in an environment shaped by artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning, data, analytics and cloud-based tools, using insights responsibly with our standards of data governance, security and ethical use.

What You Bring

We encourage you to apply even if you do not meet all requirements below.

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or related field
  • Proficiency in Python and SQL, including experience with popular frameworks such as tensorflow, , PyTorch, sklearn, and SQLAlchemy.

  • Proficiency in SQL and, ideally also, NoSQL databases.
  • Experience with GitHub and established workflows for version control and collaboration.
  • Strong understanding of machine learning (ML) and statistical techniques, with a track record of developing and ideally deploying ML models.

Title: Full Stack Data Scientist
Description:
Millaisesta työstä sinä innostuisit juuri nyt?




Olisiko työn haastettava ja kehitettävä taitojasi? Tulisiko sen tuottaa tunne, että olet tekemässä jotain merkittävää? Haluaisitko työskennellä työyhteisössä, jossa välittäminen näkyy jokapäiväisissä teoissa ja kohtaamisissa?




Mitä jos sanoisimme, että meillä työskennellessäsi nämä kaikki seikat yhdistyvät yhdeksi – sinun erinomaiseksi työntekijäkokemukseksesi.




🧑‍🚀 Lyhyt kuvaus työstäsi Full Stack Data Scientistina

Kanssamme luot asiakkaillemme liiketoiminnallista arvoa ja konkreettista kilpailuetua auttamalla heitä tekemään parempia päätöksiä datan avulla.




Konsultoit, kehität ja viet eteenpäin innovaatioita, jotka auttavat yrityksiä ja yhteisöjä toimimaan fiksusti ja ketterästi. Teet monimutkaisesta yksinkertaista uusimmilla teknologioilla, tehokkaimmilla laskentatavoilla ja parhailla käytännöillä.




Teknologisesta näkökulmasta erilaiset tietovarastot, laskentaympäristöt ja datankäsittelytyökalut ovat osa arkeasi siinä missä pilvipalvelut (AWS, ja Azure ja GCP) sekä ohjelmointikielet ovat erottamaton osa työtäsi.




Vielä lisää konkretiaa

Olemme ylpeitä, kuinka jatkuva oppiminen on luonnollinen osa nitorilaisten päivittäistä asiakasprojektissa työskentelyä. Lue Data Scientistimme, Tuukka Stewenin oppimismatkasta.

Täältä pääset tutustumaan Finnairille toteuttamaamme operatiivisen toiminnan työkaluun.

Data Scientistimme ja projektissa mukana ollut tuleva työkaverisi Jukka kertoo kokemuksiansa projektista ja meillä työskentelystä täällä.

Miltä dataosaajamme työpäivä näyttää – käy vilkaisemassa Eeron tarina.




🤝 Dataliiketoimintamme on yksi kasvualueistamme




Meillä on kokemusta ja osaamista merkittävien toimeksiantojen toteuttamiseen. Asiakastyytyväisyytemme on huippuluokkaa ja kehitämme jatkuvasti toimintaamme.




Katseemme on myös vahvasti tulevassa. Kun tulet työkaveriksemme, uskomme, että se vie meitä taas askeleen eteenpäin – samalla kun katsomme sinulle uraasi ja kehittymistäsi tukevat toimeksiannot, joissa työskentelet yhdessä toisten nitorilaisten kanssa. Meillä saat toteuttaa näköistäsi työelämää yhteiseen tulevaisuuteemme vaikuttaen.




Tuleva data-asiantuntijoiden tiimisi on tiivis startup-henkinen ja uuden oppimista arvostava, jolta löytyy poikkeuksellisen korkeatasoista dataosaamista. Ja jos palaset loksahtavat kohdalleen, tätä joukkoa sinä täydennät juuri sellaisena kuin olet.




✅ Mitä sinä voisit tuoda mukanasi?




Tässä tehtävässä loistat, kun sinulla on ohjelmointikokemusta, kyky kehittää koodia modernein menetelmin sekä matemaattisen ajattelun mentaliteetti ja taito. Olet kiinnostunut tekoälystä ja koneoppimisesta. Koska ala menee eteenpäin vauhdilla, on tärkeää, että olet innostunut uuden omaksumisesta ja näet haasteet mahdollisuuksina.




Mitä enemmän sinulla on osaamista, se luonnollisesti tarjoaa enemmän mahdollisuuksia heti ensimetreistäsi lähtien. Emme kuitenkaan halua liian tarkkaan määrittää tässä kohtaa, millainen sinun tulisi olla. Palaset kun voivat loksahtaa kohdalleen niin monella tapaa.




🏆Mitä jos valitsisitkin meidät?

Me uskomme, että rekrytoinnissa ei ole kyse siitä, että yritys valitsee uuden työntekijän. Sinä lopulta teet valinnan. Ja me voimme sinua siinä auttaa.




Sinun kannattaa olla meihin yhteydessä, jos

haluat työskennellä mielekkäiden toimeksiantojen parissa relevantteja, uusia asioita oppien.
rinnallasi työskentelevät osaavat kollegat, erinomaiset kouluttautumismahdollisuudet sekä optimaaliset työolosuhteet ja -välineet ovat sinulle tärkeitä asioita.
koet, että yhteisöllisyys ja toisille hyvän tahtominen ovat työelämässä merkityksellisiä arvoja.
sinusta on ihan ok tehdä normityöaikaa ja huolehtia, että vapaat ja työt pysyvät balanssissa.
työskentelet mielelläsi pitkäaikaisissa asiakkuuksissa projektista toiseen poukkoilun sijaan.




Työskentelyäsi ja arkeasi tukevat meillä myös muuten hyvin monimuotoiset edut ja mahdollisuudet:




Voit esimerkiksi käyttää 10 % työajastasi ammatilliseen kehittymiseen.
Palkitsemme suorittamasi sertifikaatit bonuksin (500–2000 €/sertifikaatti).
Saat käyttöösi 7100 € työvälineiden hankkimiseen.
Sinulla on mahdollisuus palkalliseen lomaan heti meillä aloitettuasi.
Lisäksi meillä on kattavat henkilöstöedut ja innostavaa yhteistä ajanviettoa.




⭐ Haluaisitko jutella kanssamme tarkemmin, mitä me voisimme sinulle tarjota?

Liity nyt data-ammattilaistemme, koodareidemme, suunnittelijoidemme ja valmentajiemme joukkoon työskentelemään luovassa sekä byrokratiavapaassa työkulttuurissa.




Olisimme todella innostuneita kuulemaan sinusta lisää. Kerro, millaista askelta olet urallasi ottamassa, ja katsotaan, miten me voisimme sinua auttaa.




❓Onko mielessäsi kysymyksiä? Pohdituttaako jokin seikka?

Lähetä meille viesti niin People Partnerimme Ella Raskila (ella.raskila@nitor.com) vastaa kaikkiin kysymyksiisi ja auttaa sinua. Varmistetaan, että saat kaiken tarvitsemasi tiedon sinulle tärkeän päätöksen tekemiseksi.




👥 Me kuuntelemme sinua

Me haluamme tarjota työntekijöillemme parhaan mahdollisen työpaikan ja tukea sinun osaamisesi kehittymistä. Nitorilla juuri sinä, ainutlaatuiset taitosi ja henkilökohtaiset kiinnostuksen kohteesi määrittävät urasi suunnan.

Kiehtovat projektit, luontainen uteliaisuutemme ja kollegojesi tuki motivoivat sinua jatkuvassa oppimisessa. Osallistut mielenkiintoisiin koulutuksiin, tapahtumiin ja konferensseihin. Lisäksi voit käyttää osan työajastasi uuden oppimiseen, yhteisömme kehittämiseen sekä sinua inspiroiviin pro bono –projekteihin.

Meillä urapolkusi ei ole ennalta määrätty – päinvastoin, kannustamme sinua tutkimaan kiinnostuksen kohteitasi ilman turhaa hierarkiaa ja byrokratiaa. Nitorilla äänesi kuuluu.




🎯 Lyhyesti Nitorista – toivottavasti sinunkin tulevasta työpaikastasi

Jokainen nitorilainen on digitaalinen insinööri; pragmaattinen ja ratkaisukeskeinen tiimipelaaja, joka ei tyydy oletuksiin. Meille ominaista ovat todella korkea ammattitaito ja ylpeys niin omasta kuin kollegoidemmekin työstä.

Yli 250 asiantuntijaamme toimivat Helsingissä, Tampereella ja Tukholmassa, yhdistäen monipuoliset osaamisensa merkityksellisten vaikutusten saavuttamiseksi. Olemme ylpeitä työntekijälähtöisestä kulttuuristamme ja aidosta sitoutumisestamme ihmistemme kasvuun – tunnustuksena tästä meidät on palkittu Great Place to Work -sertifikaatilla sekä valittu Suomen vetovoimaisimmaksi työnantajabrändiksi.




Visiomme on selkeä: olla alan halutuin työpaikka, jossa menestys syntyy työntekijöiden ja asiakkaiden hyvinvoinnista ja tyytyväisyydestä. Jatkamme kasvuamme IT-alan asiakastyytyväisyyden suunnannäyttäjänä tuottaen erinomaista lisäarvoa asiakkaillemme (lue, miten ainutlaatuinen asiakaskokemus ruokkii kasvuamme).

Show more

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
Casumo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Join us at Casumo, where you are invited to be your authentic YOU-MO!

Company Overview

Welcome to Casumo, your passport to a world of fun, excitement, and responsible gaming. We're an international online casino company with a knack for creating unforgettable gaming experiences. Our secret sauce? A blend of innovation, security, and a dash of playful charm.

Nowadays, we're on the hunt for an AI Engineer to join our team!

Position Overview

As an AI Engineer, you will design and implement AI solutions to automate processes, enhance personalization, and drive innovation. Key responsibilities include identifying AI opportunities, ensuring compliance, monitoring model performance, and safeguarding data security. You’ll lead AI lifecycle management and stay updated on advancements to deliver impactful and ethical solutions aligned with business goals.

Responsibilities


Manage and implement AI use cases that enhance business processes through automation, personalisation, and innovation.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., marketing, operations, compliance) to identify opportunities where AI can deliver tangible business benefits.
Lead the development and integration of Generative AI (GenAI) tools.
Work closely with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and define technical specifications for AI solutions.
Build machine learning models using supervised and unsupervised learning techniques, including (but not limited to) linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, support vector machines (SVM), naive bayes, k-means clustering, random forests, neural networks, natural language processing (NLP), deep learning, etc.
Oversee the entire AI/ML Ops lifecycle, from ideation and model development to deployment into production and ongoing monitoring.
Ensure robust testing, version control, and continuous integration of AI models into the production environment.
Implement monitoring and performance tracking systems to ensure AI models deliver consistent results and can be retrained as needed.
Ensure that all AI initiatives comply with the company’s AI governance framework, emphasising security, compliance, and ethical standards.
Monitor AI/ML model usage to prevent bias, discrimination, or unethical outcomes, ensuring AI systems are transparent and fair.
Work closely with legal and compliance teams to ensure AI tools comply with relevant regulations (e.g., GDPR, EU AI Act) and industry standards.
Ensure that all AI implementations follow security best practices, particularly when handling sensitive player data.
Collaborate with data security teams to prevent unauthorised access, breaches, and data manipulation in AI processes.
Implement data privacy measures and ensure that AI-driven tools handle personal and behavioural data in a compliant and secure manner.
Stay at the forefront of AI advancements and GenAI technologies to bring innovative solutions to the business.
Work closely with data engineers and tech teams to ensure seamless integration of AI solutions into existing systems and data platforms.
Collaborate with the product and business teams to align AI solutions with broader strategic goals.
Identify areas for improvement in AI models, tools, and processes to enhance their efficiency, accuracy, and scalability.
Continuously research emerging AI technologies and techniques, particularly in GenAI, to keep the company ahead of the competition.
Conduct post-deployment evaluations to refine AI solutions and ensure optimal performance over time.


Requirements:


Bachelor’s degree in data science, computer science, information systems, data engineering, or a related field.
2+ years of experience in AI, machine learning, or data science roles, with hands-on experience in developing and deploying AI solutions.
Experience with Generative AI tools and techniques (e.g., GPT models, Transformer models) is essential.
Experience building and deploying machine learning models into production, including supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.

Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies, tools, and methodologies in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

Casumo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Join us at Casumo, where you are invited to be your authentic YOU-MO!

Company Overview

Welcome to Casumo, your passport to a world of fun, excitement, and responsible gaming. We're an international online casino company with a knack for creating unforgettable gaming experiences. Our secret sauce? A blend of innovation, security, and a dash of playful charm.

Nowadays, we're on the hunt for an AI Engineer to join our team!

Position Overview

As an AI Engineer, you will design and implement AI solutions to automate processes, enhance personalization, and drive innovation. Key responsibilities include identifying AI opportunities, ensuring compliance, monitoring model performance, and safeguarding data security. You’ll lead AI lifecycle management and stay updated on advancements to deliver impactful and ethical solutions aligned with business goals.

Responsibilities

  • Manage and implement AI use cases that enhance business processes through automation, personalisation, and innovation.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., marketing, operations, compliance) to identify opportunities where AI can deliver tangible business benefits.
  • Lead the development and integration of Generative AI (GenAI) tools.
  • Work closely with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and define technical specifications for AI solutions.
  • Build machine learning models using supervised and unsupervised learning techniques, including (but not limited to) linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, support vector machines (SVM), naive bayes, k-means clustering, random forests, neural networks, natural language processing (NLP), deep learning, etc.
  • Oversee the entire AI/ML Ops lifecycle, from ideation and model development to deployment into production and ongoing monitoring.
  • Ensure robust testing, version control, and continuous integration of AI models into the production environment.
  • Implement monitoring and performance tracking systems to ensure AI models deliver consistent results and can be retrained as needed.
  • Ensure that all AI initiatives comply with the company’s AI governance framework, emphasising security, compliance, and ethical standards.
  • Monitor AI/ML model usage to prevent bias, discrimination, or unethical outcomes, ensuring AI systems are transparent and fair.
  • Work closely with legal and compliance teams to ensure AI tools comply with relevant regulations (e.g., GDPR, EU AI Act) and industry standards.
  • Ensure that all AI implementations follow security best practices, particularly when handling sensitive player data.
  • Collaborate with data security teams to prevent unauthorised access, breaches, and data manipulation in AI processes.
  • Implement data privacy measures and ensure that AI-driven tools handle personal and behavioural data in a compliant and secure manner.
  • Stay at the forefront of AI advancements and GenAI technologies to bring innovative solutions to the business.
  • Work closely with data engineers and tech teams to ensure seamless integration of AI solutions into existing systems and data platforms.
  • Collaborate with the product and business teams to align AI solutions with broader strategic goals.
  • Identify areas for improvement in AI models, tools, and processes to enhance their efficiency, accuracy, and scalability.
  • Continuously research emerging AI technologies and techniques, particularly in GenAI, to keep the company ahead of the competition.
  • Conduct post-deployment evaluations to refine AI solutions and ensure optimal performance over time.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in data science, computer science, information systems, data engineering, or a related field.
  • 2+ years of experience in AI, machine learning, or data science roles, with hands-on experience in developing and deploying AI solutions.
  • Experience with Generative AI tools and techniques (e.g., GPT models, Transformer models) is essential.
  • Experience building and deploying machine learning models into production, including supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.
  • In-depth knowledge of machine learning algorithms: linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, support vector machines (SVM), naive bayes, k-means clustering, neural networks, and deep learning.
  • Expertise in designing and deploying agentic AI workflows and integrations via n8n, Make, or similar automation platforms.
  • High proficiency in AI-native development environments such as Claude Code, Cursor, Google Antigravity, etc., accelerating the software development lifecycle.
  • Strong experience in AI/ML Ops, with a proven track record of successfully deploying AI models into production.
  • Advanced SQL skills and proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., Python, R) for data processing, machine learning, and automation.
  • Experience with data pipelines, AI tool monitoring, and AI tool/model retraining processes in an AI Ops environment.
  • Familiarity with cloud-based AI/ML platforms (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform, Azure AI, Snowflake Cortex AI).
  • Strong understanding of AI ethics, security, compliance, and regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR).
  • Experience working with AI governance frameworks, ensuring AI solutions are secure, compliant, and ethically sound.
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills, with a focus on delivering business value through AI.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross-functionally across business and technical teams.
  • Strong project management skills, with the ability to prioritise tasks, manage timelines, and meet deadlines.
  • Experience managing multiple projects simultaneously and delivering them on time.
  • Ability to translate technical concepts into business-friendly language.
  • Strong documentation skills with attention to detail in managing documentation.
  • Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies, tools, and methodologies in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.
  • Willingness to stay up to date with the latest trends and best practices in AI and data management.
  • Previous experience in the iGaming industry is a plus.

Title: Data Scientist till HiQ Syd
Description:
Data Scientists – dags att sätta avtryck på framtiden!

På HiQ är vi övertygade om att teknik ska vara rolig, enkel och mänsklig. Vi tror att digitala lösningar kan förändra vardagen för människor – men även att resan dit ska vara fylld av både en stor portion nyfikenhet och viljan att hela tiden bli lite bättre.

Vi kombinerar spetskompetens inom IT med en kultur där det finns utrymme för både nyfikenhet och lekfullhet. Hos oss får du bidra med din expertis, växa i din roll och utvecklas tillsammans med kollegor som värdesätter samarbete högt. Nu söker vi en erfaren Data Scientist som vill vara en del av vår resa och sätta sin prägel på framtidens lösningar. 🚀

Såhär kommer du att bidra

I rollen som Data Scientist kommer du att designa och utveckla avancerade maskininlärningsmodeller som är både robusta och innovativa, samtidigt som de skapar verkligt affärsvärde. Du kommer att utforska och analysera stora datamängder för att identifiera trender, genomföra statistiska analyser och hypotesprövningar som stöttar strategiska beslut. Din förmåga att översätta komplexa analytiska resultat till tydliga och handlingsbara insikter är avgörande för att driva framgångsrika projekt och skapa nytta för våra kunder.

Vi letar efter dig som…


Har minst 4 års erfarenhet i branschen.
Har erfarenhet av Python och C++
Har goda kunskaper i SQL samt av arbete med stora datamängder.
Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP samt hantering av data lakes, data warehouses och ETL-processer.


Vi ser även positivt på om du har erfarenhet av ML-bibliotek som TensorFlow, PyTorch eller scikit-learn. Du får gärna vara bekant med att integrera Generativ AI i olika lösningar samt har erfarenhet av Retrieval-Augmented Generation och vektordatabaser. Har du dessutom utvecklat och implementerat avancerade modeller inom exempelvis deep learning, såsom CNN, RNN eller transformer-arkitekturer, är detta meriterande.

Därtill ser vi gärna att du har relevant akademisk examen inom t.ex. data science, matematik, statistik, teknisk fysik eller datavetenskap.

Är du vår nästa HiQare?

I Syd har vi kontor i Malmö, Helsingborg och Karlskrona. Om du vill bygga framtidens digitala lösningar, utveckla din kompetens och samtidigt vara en del av ett gäng som tror att skratt, kaffe och kreativitet går hand i hand – då vill vi höra från dig!

👉 Skicka in din ansökan idag och bli en del av HiQ-gemenskapen!

Sist men inte minst!

Vi välkomnar ansökningar från alla - oavsett ålder, könsidentitet eller uttryck, livserfarenhet och bakgrund. Vi tror att mångfald skapar nytänkande och bidrar med fler perspektiv till bordet. Hoppas vi hörs snart!
Show more

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
🚀 Passionate about leveraging data to drive real business impact and enhance strategic decision-making?




We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our growing Delivery team. In this role, you will analyze complex datasets, develop advanced analytics solutions and support data-driven decision-making processes, helping organizations unlock the full potential of their data.




If you enjoy working with diverse teams and leveraging data to solve real-world business challenges across industries such as Banking, Telecommunications, Retail etc., this role may be the right fit for you.




🛠️ What you will be doing:

Data mining or extracting usable data from business data sources
Use of machine learning tools to select features as well as create and optimize classifiers
Preprocess of structured and unstructured data
Enhance data collection procedures to include all relevant information for developing analytic systems
Process, clean and validate the integrity of data to be used for analysis
Analyze large amounts of information to find patterns and solutions
Develop prediction systems and machine learning algorithms
Propose solutions and strategies to tackle business challenges
Work closely with stakeholders – internal and external, including business analysts, IT team, project managers, data scientists and engineers. Collaborate with all stakeholders to understand their data needs and deliver solutions that meet them
Present graphically the results of the process




🔍 What we are looking for:

Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering or a related field
Master’s degree in related field
At least 2-5 years of proven work experience as a Data Scientist
Extensive experience in data mining, interpreting and cleaning data as well as in machine learning
Advanced programming skills – Knowledge of R, SQL or Python
Working experience with Microsoft Azure Technology and Databricks or similar technology
Data visualization & data wrangling experience
Very good knowledge of a variety of machine learning techniques (clustering, decision tree learning, artificial neural networks, etc.) and their real-world advantages
Very good applied statistical skills, including knowledge of statistical tests, distributions, regression, maximum likelihood estimators, etc.
Excellent communication skills – it is incredibly important to describe findings to a technical and non-technical audience




We are seeking professionals with:

Natural curiosity and a creative mind
Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and critical-thinking abilities
Ability to ask the right questions, connect the dots and uncover hidden opportunities for realizing the data’s full potential
Analytical mind and great business sense
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities effectively meeting deadlines
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams as well as independently
Excellent command of Greek and English, both written and spoken




🌟 What’s in it for you?

💸 Competitive remuneration package, cash perk and annual bonus scheme
👩 Health insurance coverage
🏦 Pension plan
🧘 Wellness perk
💻 Cutting-edge IT equipment, mobile and data plan
⭐Continuous opportunities for development in a modern and dynamic work environment
