Title: Full Stack Data Scientist
Description:
Are you a Full Stack Data Scientist driven by turning data into tangible business results? Do you want to help organizations become more productive and competitive?

Vuono Group is now looking for Full Stack Data Scientists to join our growing team of experts in Helsinki. Vuono Group is a consultancy that drives business value with processes and AI. We empower Nordic organisations in both the private and public sectors to bridge the gap between business needs and AI capabilities, enabling smarter decision-making, increased operational efficiency, and accelerated growth.

About The Role

As a Full Stack Data Scientist, you are interested in what happens under the hood of modern data solutions and data architectures. You care about data quality, usability and the value it can provide for various business processes. You're experienced with data science and engineering practices, including data observability, implementing MLOps (maybe even LLMOps) workflows and real-time data processing. You understand the intersection of ML/AI systems and data engineering and can build scalable pipelines that support both analytical and operational use cases. Experience with cloud-native data architectures (e.g. Azure, AWS, GCP) is essential.

At Vuono Group, you will get to work in a cross-competence team making our clients' businesses more intelligent with data. In practice, this means building data pipelines, integrating systems together, and utilising ML and AI for insights and operational use cases.

What We’re Looking For


Experience in planning and building production level data solutions that solve real business problems
An analytical mindset and problem-solving skills
Machine learning modeling and/or natural language processing experience
Experience in designing and implementing end-to-end data pipelines that transform raw operational data into business-ready information products
Experience in running and monitoring production workloads
Programming experience in Python and SQL
Willingness and readiness to learn and operate with new technology platforms, tools, whether low code like Celonis or Fabric or pro code like new cloud infrastructure
MSc degree in Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, Data Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science or similar
Professional-level Finnish and English language proficiency


The Following Is Considered a Plus


Interest in continuously learning and applying new technologies and platforms; generative AI, RAG, AI Agents, among others
Experience with various tech stacks, e.g. AWS Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric, DBT, Apache Kafka, Terraform, or similar
Experience in utilising data from business technology platforms, such as ERP, CRM or similar (SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow, etc.)
Experience in transforming data for process and content intelligence purposes
Previous consulting experience


You don’t need to tick every box! What matters most is your drive to make a real impact!

What We Offer

We are building the best work environment for professionals in digital efficiency. To get there, we invest in the well-being and work-life balance as well as the professional development of our people. We operate on trust and transparency rather than titles, fostering a high-autonomy, growth-oriented environment where collaboration, impact, and everyone’s unique thoughts and ideas are valued.

In addition to the usual perks, such as work tools of your choice and extensive healthcare benefits, we also offer our employees the opportunity to invest in our rapidly growing company via an employee share program.

Work with Leading Nordic Companies

At Vuono Group, you’ll collaborate with Nordic clients on a range of challenging digital projects. Our clients include companies like Valmet, Vaisala, Moovy, and SATO. Along the way, you’ll have the opportunity to influence technical decisions, architecture, and how solutions are built. Explore some of our client cases here.

Next steps

We’re always on the lookout for new talent, which is why we recruit on a rolling basis. If this opportunity feels like the right fit for you, take the next step and submit your application! Once we receive your application, we’ll be in touch.

Our recruitment process typically includes at least two interviews, giving you the chance to meet some of our team members and giving us the opportunity to get to know you better: as a professional, a colleague, and a person. Reference checks are also a standard part of our process. We look forward to hearing from you!

Vuono Group is a process AI company. We create superior business processes through data and AI. Our growing team of kind and ambitious people is on a mission to turn AI into real, measurable business impact. Take the next step, explore our open positions and connect with us to find your next opportunity!

Title: Full Stack Data Scientist
Description:
Millaisesta työstä sinä innostuisit juuri nyt?




Olisiko työn haastettava ja kehitettävä taitojasi? Tulisiko sen tuottaa tunne, että olet tekemässä jotain merkittävää? Haluaisitko työskennellä työyhteisössä, jossa välittäminen näkyy jokapäiväisissä teoissa ja kohtaamisissa?




Mitä jos sanoisimme, että meillä työskennellessäsi nämä kaikki seikat yhdistyvät yhdeksi – sinun erinomaiseksi työntekijäkokemukseksesi.




🧑‍🚀 Lyhyt kuvaus työstäsi Full Stack Data Scientistina

Kanssamme luot asiakkaillemme liiketoiminnallista arvoa ja konkreettista kilpailuetua auttamalla heitä tekemään parempia päätöksiä datan avulla.




Konsultoit, kehität ja viet eteenpäin innovaatioita, jotka auttavat yrityksiä ja yhteisöjä toimimaan fiksusti ja ketterästi. Teet monimutkaisesta yksinkertaista uusimmilla teknologioilla, tehokkaimmilla laskentatavoilla ja parhailla käytännöillä.




Teknologisesta näkökulmasta erilaiset tietovarastot, laskentaympäristöt ja datankäsittelytyökalut ovat osa arkeasi siinä missä pilvipalvelut (AWS, ja Azure ja GCP) sekä ohjelmointikielet ovat erottamaton osa työtäsi.




Vielä lisää konkretiaa

Olemme ylpeitä, kuinka jatkuva oppiminen on luonnollinen osa nitorilaisten päivittäistä asiakasprojektissa työskentelyä. Lue Data Scientistimme, Tuukka Stewenin oppimismatkasta.

Täältä pääset tutustumaan Finnairille toteuttamaamme operatiivisen toiminnan työkaluun.

Data Scientistimme ja projektissa mukana ollut tuleva työkaverisi Jukka kertoo kokemuksiansa projektista ja meillä työskentelystä täällä.

Miltä dataosaajamme työpäivä näyttää – käy vilkaisemassa Eeron tarina.




🤝 Dataliiketoimintamme on yksi kasvualueistamme




Meillä on kokemusta ja osaamista merkittävien toimeksiantojen toteuttamiseen. Asiakastyytyväisyytemme on huippuluokkaa ja kehitämme jatkuvasti toimintaamme.




Katseemme on myös vahvasti tulevassa. Kun tulet työkaveriksemme, uskomme, että se vie meitä taas askeleen eteenpäin – samalla kun katsomme sinulle uraasi ja kehittymistäsi tukevat toimeksiannot, joissa työskentelet yhdessä toisten nitorilaisten kanssa. Meillä saat toteuttaa näköistäsi työelämää yhteiseen tulevaisuuteemme vaikuttaen.




Tuleva data-asiantuntijoiden tiimisi on tiivis startup-henkinen ja uuden oppimista arvostava, jolta löytyy poikkeuksellisen korkeatasoista dataosaamista. Ja jos palaset loksahtavat kohdalleen, tätä joukkoa sinä täydennät juuri sellaisena kuin olet.




✅ Mitä sinä voisit tuoda mukanasi?




Tässä tehtävässä loistat, kun sinulla on ohjelmointikokemusta, kyky kehittää koodia modernein menetelmin sekä matemaattisen ajattelun mentaliteetti ja taito. Olet kiinnostunut tekoälystä ja koneoppimisesta. Koska ala menee eteenpäin vauhdilla, on tärkeää, että olet innostunut uuden omaksumisesta ja näet haasteet mahdollisuuksina.




Mitä enemmän sinulla on osaamista, se luonnollisesti tarjoaa enemmän mahdollisuuksia heti ensimetreistäsi lähtien. Emme kuitenkaan halua liian tarkkaan määrittää tässä kohtaa, millainen sinun tulisi olla. Palaset kun voivat loksahtaa kohdalleen niin monella tapaa.




🏆Mitä jos valitsisitkin meidät?

Me uskomme, että rekrytoinnissa ei ole kyse siitä, että yritys valitsee uuden työntekijän. Sinä lopulta teet valinnan. Ja me voimme sinua siinä auttaa.




Sinun kannattaa olla meihin yhteydessä, jos

haluat työskennellä mielekkäiden toimeksiantojen parissa relevantteja, uusia asioita oppien.
rinnallasi työskentelevät osaavat kollegat, erinomaiset kouluttautumismahdollisuudet sekä optimaaliset työolosuhteet ja -välineet ovat sinulle tärkeitä asioita.
koet, että yhteisöllisyys ja toisille hyvän tahtominen ovat työelämässä merkityksellisiä arvoja.
sinusta on ihan ok tehdä normityöaikaa ja huolehtia, että vapaat ja työt pysyvät balanssissa.
työskentelet mielelläsi pitkäaikaisissa asiakkuuksissa projektista toiseen poukkoilun sijaan.




Työskentelyäsi ja arkeasi tukevat meillä myös muuten hyvin monimuotoiset edut ja mahdollisuudet:




Voit esimerkiksi käyttää 10 % työajastasi ammatilliseen kehittymiseen.
Palkitsemme suorittamasi sertifikaatit bonuksin (500–2000 €/sertifikaatti).
Saat käyttöösi 7100 € työvälineiden hankkimiseen.
Sinulla on mahdollisuus palkalliseen lomaan heti meillä aloitettuasi.
Lisäksi meillä on kattavat henkilöstöedut ja innostavaa yhteistä ajanviettoa.




⭐ Haluaisitko jutella kanssamme tarkemmin, mitä me voisimme sinulle tarjota?

Liity nyt data-ammattilaistemme, koodareidemme, suunnittelijoidemme ja valmentajiemme joukkoon työskentelemään luovassa sekä byrokratiavapaassa työkulttuurissa.




Olisimme todella innostuneita kuulemaan sinusta lisää. Kerro, millaista askelta olet urallasi ottamassa, ja katsotaan, miten me voisimme sinua auttaa.




❓Onko mielessäsi kysymyksiä? Pohdituttaako jokin seikka?

Lähetä meille viesti niin People Partnerimme Ella Raskila (ella.raskila@nitor.com) vastaa kaikkiin kysymyksiisi ja auttaa sinua. Varmistetaan, että saat kaiken tarvitsemasi tiedon sinulle tärkeän päätöksen tekemiseksi.




👥 Me kuuntelemme sinua

Me haluamme tarjota työntekijöillemme parhaan mahdollisen työpaikan ja tukea sinun osaamisesi kehittymistä. Nitorilla juuri sinä, ainutlaatuiset taitosi ja henkilökohtaiset kiinnostuksen kohteesi määrittävät urasi suunnan.

Kiehtovat projektit, luontainen uteliaisuutemme ja kollegojesi tuki motivoivat sinua jatkuvassa oppimisessa. Osallistut mielenkiintoisiin koulutuksiin, tapahtumiin ja konferensseihin. Lisäksi voit käyttää osan työajastasi uuden oppimiseen, yhteisömme kehittämiseen sekä sinua inspiroiviin pro bono –projekteihin.

Meillä urapolkusi ei ole ennalta määrätty – päinvastoin, kannustamme sinua tutkimaan kiinnostuksen kohteitasi ilman turhaa hierarkiaa ja byrokratiaa. Nitorilla äänesi kuuluu.




🎯 Lyhyesti Nitorista – toivottavasti sinunkin tulevasta työpaikastasi

Jokainen nitorilainen on digitaalinen insinööri; pragmaattinen ja ratkaisukeskeinen tiimipelaaja, joka ei tyydy oletuksiin. Meille ominaista ovat todella korkea ammattitaito ja ylpeys niin omasta kuin kollegoidemmekin työstä.

Yli 250 asiantuntijaamme toimivat Helsingissä, Tampereella ja Tukholmassa, yhdistäen monipuoliset osaamisensa merkityksellisten vaikutusten saavuttamiseksi. Olemme ylpeitä työntekijälähtöisestä kulttuuristamme ja aidosta sitoutumisestamme ihmistemme kasvuun – tunnustuksena tästä meidät on palkittu Great Place to Work -sertifikaatilla sekä valittu Suomen vetovoimaisimmaksi työnantajabrändiksi.




Visiomme on selkeä: olla alan halutuin työpaikka, jossa menestys syntyy työntekijöiden ja asiakkaiden hyvinvoinnista ja tyytyväisyydestä. Jatkamme kasvuamme IT-alan asiakastyytyväisyyden suunnannäyttäjänä tuottaen erinomaista lisäarvoa asiakkaillemme (lue, miten ainutlaatuinen asiakaskokemus ruokkii kasvuamme).

HTML:
Millaisesta työstä sinä innostuisit juuri nyt?


Olisiko työn haastettava ja kehitettävä taitojasi? Tulisiko sen tuottaa tunne, että olet tekemässä jotain merkittävää? Haluaisitko työskennellä työyhteisössä, jossa välittäminen näkyy jokapäiväisissä teoissa ja kohtaamisissa?


Mitä jos sanoisimme, että meillä työskennellessäsi nämä kaikki seikat yhdistyvät yhdeksi – sinun erinomaiseksi työntekijäkokemukseksesi.


🧑‍🚀 Lyhyt kuvaus työstäsi Full Stack Data Scientistina

Kanssamme luot asiakkaillemme liiketoiminnallista arvoa ja konkreettista kilpailuetua auttamalla heitä tekemään parempia päätöksiä datan avulla.


Konsultoit, kehität ja viet eteenpäin innovaatioita, jotka auttavat yrityksiä ja yhteisöjä toimimaan fiksusti ja ketterästi. Teet monimutkaisesta yksinkertaista uusimmilla teknologioilla, tehokkaimmilla laskentatavoilla ja parhailla käytännöillä.


Teknologisesta näkökulmasta erilaiset tietovarastot, laskentaympäristöt ja datankäsittelytyökalut ovat osa arkeasi siinä missä pilvipalvelut (AWS, ja Azure ja GCP) sekä ohjelmointikielet ovat erottamaton osa työtäsi.


Vielä lisää konkretiaa

Olemme ylpeitä, kuinka jatkuva oppiminen on luonnollinen osa nitorilaisten päivittäistä asiakasprojektissa työskentelyä. Lue Data Scientistimme, Tuukka Stewenin oppimismatkasta.

Täältä pääset tutustumaan Finnairille toteuttamaamme operatiivisen toiminnan työkaluun.

Data Scientistimme ja projektissa mukana ollut tuleva työkaverisi Jukka kertoo kokemuksiansa projektista ja meillä työskentelystä täällä.

Miltä dataosaajamme työpäivä näyttää – käy vilkaisemassa Eeron tarina.


🤝 Dataliiketoimintamme on yksi kasvualueistamme


Meillä on kokemusta ja osaamista merkittävien toimeksiantojen toteuttamiseen. Asiakastyytyväisyytemme on huippuluokkaa ja kehitämme jatkuvasti toimintaamme.


Katseemme on myös vahvasti tulevassa. Kun tulet työkaveriksemme, uskomme, että se vie meitä taas askeleen eteenpäin – samalla kun katsomme sinulle uraasi ja kehittymistäsi tukevat toimeksiannot, joissa työskentelet yhdessä toisten nitorilaisten kanssa. Meillä saat toteuttaa näköistäsi työelämää yhteiseen tulevaisuuteemme vaikuttaen.


Tuleva data-asiantuntijoiden tiimisi on tiivis startup-henkinen ja uuden oppimista arvostava, jolta löytyy poikkeuksellisen korkeatasoista dataosaamista. Ja jos palaset loksahtavat kohdalleen, tätä joukkoa sinä täydennät juuri sellaisena kuin olet.


✅ Mitä sinä voisit tuoda mukanasi?


Tässä tehtävässä loistat, kun sinulla on ohjelmointikokemusta, kyky kehittää koodia modernein menetelmin sekä matemaattisen ajattelun mentaliteetti ja taito. Olet kiinnostunut tekoälystä ja koneoppimisesta. Koska ala menee eteenpäin vauhdilla, on tärkeää, että olet innostunut uuden omaksumisesta ja näet haasteet mahdollisuuksina.


Mitä enemmän sinulla on osaamista, se luonnollisesti tarjoaa enemmän mahdollisuuksia heti ensimetreistäsi lähtien. Emme kuitenkaan halua liian tarkkaan määrittää tässä kohtaa, millainen sinun tulisi olla. Palaset kun voivat loksahtaa kohdalleen niin monella tapaa.


🏆Mitä jos valitsisitkin meidät?

Me uskomme, että rekrytoinnissa ei ole kyse siitä, että yritys valitsee uuden työntekijän. Sinä lopulta teet valinnan. Ja me voimme sinua siinä auttaa.


Sinun kannattaa olla meihin yhteydessä, jos

  • haluat työskennellä mielekkäiden toimeksiantojen parissa relevantteja, uusia asioita oppien.
  • rinnallasi työskentelevät osaavat kollegat, erinomaiset kouluttautumismahdollisuudet sekä optimaaliset työolosuhteet ja -välineet ovat sinulle tärkeitä asioita.
  • koet, että yhteisöllisyys ja toisille hyvän tahtominen ovat työelämässä merkityksellisiä arvoja.
  • sinusta on ihan ok tehdä normityöaikaa ja huolehtia, että vapaat ja työt pysyvät balanssissa.
  • työskentelet mielelläsi pitkäaikaisissa asiakkuuksissa projektista toiseen poukkoilun sijaan.


Työskentelyäsi ja arkeasi tukevat meillä myös muuten hyvin monimuotoiset edut ja mahdollisuudet:


  • Voit esimerkiksi käyttää 10 % työajastasi ammatilliseen kehittymiseen.
  • Palkitsemme suorittamasi sertifikaatit bonuksin (500–2000 €/sertifikaatti).
  • Saat käyttöösi 7100 € työvälineiden hankkimiseen.
  • Sinulla on mahdollisuus palkalliseen lomaan heti meillä aloitettuasi.
  • Lisäksi meillä on kattavat henkilöstöedut ja innostavaa yhteistä ajanviettoa.


⭐ Haluaisitko jutella kanssamme tarkemmin, mitä me voisimme sinulle tarjota?

Liity nyt data-ammattilaistemme, koodareidemme, suunnittelijoidemme ja valmentajiemme joukkoon työskentelemään luovassa sekä byrokratiavapaassa työkulttuurissa.


Olisimme todella innostuneita kuulemaan sinusta lisää. Kerro, millaista askelta olet urallasi ottamassa, ja katsotaan, miten me voisimme sinua auttaa.


❓Onko mielessäsi kysymyksiä? Pohdituttaako jokin seikka?

Lähetä meille viesti niin People Partnerimme Ella Raskila (ella.raskila@nitor.com) vastaa kaikkiin kysymyksiisi ja auttaa sinua. Varmistetaan, että saat kaiken tarvitsemasi tiedon sinulle tärkeän päätöksen tekemiseksi.


👥 Me kuuntelemme sinua

Me haluamme tarjota työntekijöillemme parhaan mahdollisen työpaikan ja tukea sinun osaamisesi kehittymistä. Nitorilla juuri sinä, ainutlaatuiset taitosi ja henkilökohtaiset kiinnostuksen kohteesi määrittävät urasi suunnan.

Kiehtovat projektit, luontainen uteliaisuutemme ja kollegojesi tuki motivoivat sinua jatkuvassa oppimisessa. Osallistut mielenkiintoisiin koulutuksiin, tapahtumiin ja konferensseihin. Lisäksi voit käyttää osan työajastasi uuden oppimiseen, yhteisömme kehittämiseen sekä sinua inspiroiviin pro bono –projekteihin.

Meillä urapolkusi ei ole ennalta määrätty – päinvastoin, kannustamme sinua tutkimaan kiinnostuksen kohteitasi ilman turhaa hierarkiaa ja byrokratiaa. Nitorilla äänesi kuuluu.


🎯 Lyhyesti Nitorista – toivottavasti sinunkin tulevasta työpaikastasi

Jokainen nitorilainen on digitaalinen insinööri; pragmaattinen ja ratkaisukeskeinen tiimipelaaja, joka ei tyydy oletuksiin. Meille ominaista ovat todella korkea ammattitaito ja ylpeys niin omasta kuin kollegoidemmekin työstä.

Yli 250 asiantuntijaamme toimivat Helsingissä, Tampereella ja Tukholmassa, yhdistäen monipuoliset osaamisensa merkityksellisten vaikutusten saavuttamiseksi. Olemme ylpeitä työntekijälähtöisestä kulttuuristamme ja aidosta sitoutumisestamme ihmistemme kasvuun – tunnustuksena tästä meidät on palkittu Great Place to Work -sertifikaatilla sekä valittu Suomen vetovoimaisimmaksi työnantajabrändiksi.


Visiomme on selkeä: olla alan halutuin työpaikka, jossa menestys syntyy työntekijöiden ja asiakkaiden hyvinvoinnista ja tyytyväisyydestä. Jatkamme kasvuamme IT-alan asiakastyytyväisyyden suunnannäyttäjänä tuottaen erinomaista lisäarvoa asiakkaillemme (lue, miten ainutlaatuinen asiakaskokemus ruokkii kasvuamme).

Title: Applied Data Scientist
Description:
Data Scientist (AI/ML) — Mid-level (3–5 years)




ABOUT THE ROLE




We build agentic AI applications for large-scale enterprise clients, including network support systems, recommendation engines, etc.. You'll work at the intersection of applied machine learning and production software — fine-tuning LLMs, routing between agents, and building retrieval pipelines that solve real operational problems. This is a hands-on engineering role, not a research position. You will own solutions end-to-end, from prototype to production.




RESPONSIBILITIES- Design, fine-tune, and evaluate AI solutions for domain-specific tasks (network support, ops automation)- Build and maintain LLM routing logic — selecting and orchestrating between multiple model providers based on task, cost, and latency requirements- Integrate LLMs into agentic AI workflows and orchestration layers- Implement RAG pipelines including chunking strategies, embedding models, and vector store management when retrieval is required- Write clean, production-ready Python code following modern project tooling standards (Hatch, pyproject.toml)- Collaborate with engineering, product, and client stakeholders to translate business requirements into data and model solutions- Evaluate model performance using rigorous metrics; run A/B tests and regression tests on model changes- Monitor deployed models in production and respond to drift, degradation, or failure modes- Document technical decisions and contribute to internal knowledge sharing




REQUIRED SKILLS

Languages & tooling: Python, Hatch, SQL,GitLLM & AI: Fine-tuning, LLM routing, Prompt engineering, RAG, Embeddings, Agentic workflows




EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS-

3–5 years of data science or ML engineering experience in an industry setting-

Demonstrated experience deploying models or AI systems to production (not just notebooks or prototypes)-

Hands-on experience with at least two major LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Llama,

etc.)- Experience working within a client-delivery or product team environment-

Familiarity with modern Python project structure and packaging (pyproject.toml, virtual environments)




NICE TO HAVE- Experience in telecom, networking, or infrastructure domains- Familiarity with agentic frameworks (AutoGen, CrewAI, custom tool-use patterns)- Experience working with or alongside large tech clients- Contributions to open-source ML tooling




WHAT WE'RE NOT LOOKING FOR

This is not a research role. We are not seeking candidates whose primary experience is publishing papers, developing novel algorithms, or academic benchmarking. We need practitioners who have shipped and maintained AI systems in production.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
MWDN is a global IT outstaffing company with 23+ years of experience that connects exceptional tech talent with leading companies across Israel, the USA, Great Britain, and Western Europe. We offer opportunities to work on international products in a stable and professional environment.

Why does MWDN rock?:

Here’s what you can expect when you join MWDN:


Security: We carefully vet our clients to minimize risks and ensure reliability and timely payments - no fraud or unpleasant surprises.
Career support: If a project isn’t the right fit, we support you and actively help find new opportunities that match your skills and career goals.
Legal assistance: We provide guidance on legal matters, including opening and managing your independent contractor or sole proprietorship status, taxes, and related processes.
Professional development: We offer English courses and professional growth opportunities, as well as team-building events.


Why choose us? MWDN is ranked among the top 5 IT employers in our region according to DOU. We take pride in our transparency and strong commitment to our team. Curious to learn more? See what our employees say about working with us on DOU.

What is your new project?:

Domain: InsurTech

Location: Israel, California

Company size: 11-50 employees

Founded in: 2016

What makes this project exciting?:

Fast-growing InsurTech start-up building an innovative AI, Machine Learning platform aiming to change the life insurance industry. They are helping insurers to become data-driven and produce insights to inform decision-making and drive new business strategies at the corporate level.

They're growing and looking for a self-motivated individual with strong technical skills to work in a fast-paced environment on our Python Backend Development team. As part of this team, you’ll take an active role in developing AI-based data science platform and get a chance to work with cutting-edge technologies including.

What Makes You a Great Fit


+3 years professional experience in Machine Learning
BSc in Computer Science / Mathematics / Statistics / Physics or equivalent (MSc / PhD - advantage)
Proficiency in Python and SQL
Industry experience from inception to production of ML models (such as time series, clustering, regression and classification algorithms)
Experience in Insurance or Fintech
Strong skills in data exploration, analysis, and visualization
Team player, positive attitude, collaborative, good communication skills
Strong problem-solving skills, with experience breaking down a large problem into smaller, manageable components


It Will Also Be Great If You Have


Experience working with reporting tools such as PowerBi/Tableau


Your Day-to-day In This Position


End to end data science cycle: designing, training, implementing, evaluating and monitoring machine learning models
Customer Churn Model, Forecasting, Segmentation, Classification and Regression
Collaborate with product managers and customers to understand business needs and build solutions together
Effectively identify and apply analytics, causal inference, experimentation, and machine learning techniques for given business problems
Present your research and insights to all levels of the company (English is a must)


Why work with us?:


People-first management with minimal bureaucracy
A friendly company culture, proven by employees who choose to return
Flexible working hours
29 days of PTO (18 working days per year pluse all national holidays)
10 paid recovery days
Full financial and legal support for independent contractors
Free English classes, with native speakers or Ukrainian teachers
Dedicated HR support


Our Next Steps

✅ Intro call with a Recruiter — ✅ Intro with the client — ✅ Tech interview — ✅ Final client interview— ✅ Offer

Title: Data Scientist/ AI Specialist
Description:
The SGB-SMIT Group is a specialized transformer manufacturer with roots in Europe and locations in Europe, Asia and the United States. The focus has always been on the claim of making an active contribution to a sustainable energy future with reliable transformer technology. SGB-SMIT Group transformers are used worldwide in key projects for the energy transition – for example in wind and solar power plants, industrial applications or in the energy infrastructure of urban agglomerations.

As an essential link in the electricity chain – between generation, transmission and distribution – the transformers of the SGB-SMIT Group ensure stable, efficient and secure energy flows. The product portfolio includes power transformers, distribution transformers, cast-resin transformers and special solutions for data centers, industry and e-mobility, among others. This diversity enables individual solutions for a wide range of requirements and applications.

With over 3,250 employees worldwide, SGB-SMIT Group stands for sustainability, quality and innovation. In close cooperation with energy suppliers, industrial customers and infrastructure operators, solutions are developed that are designed for long-term reliability, efficiency and sustainability.

What We Offer 🏝️

At the RETRASIB, we are motivated by our mission to provide a stable and sustainable energy supply for our customers around the world. Our lean decision-making process keeps us closely connected to our employees and the successes of our company. We value personal relationships among colleagues, fostering a collaborative environment for our sustainable growth:

Our Benefits


Job Stability: We offer a stable work environment with long-term development opportunities.
Performance Bonuses and Rewards: We recognize and reward achievements through bonuses or incentives.
Annual Salary Increases: Salaries may be reviewed annually based on performance evaluations.
Flexible Schedule: We offer a flexible work schedule to ensure a healthy work-life balance.
Medical Services Subscription: Your health matters, so we provide a medical subscription.
Referral Bonuses: We encourage colleagues to refer new candidates and receive a bonus.
Bonuses:
Easter: 1000 RON net
Christmas: 1200 RON net
Vacation: 2000 RON net
Meal Vouchers: Valued at 40 RON each.
Internal Library: We provide a library to nourish both mind and body.
Sports Benefits: We offer 7Card, football, volleyball, foot tennis, and fishing competitions.
Happy Events: If you or your child gets married or you become a parent, you receive additional paid leave.
Unfortunate Events: In case of unfortunate events, we offer support and paid leave.
Birthday: You receive a paid day off of your choice.
Additional Vacation Days: We reward seniority both in the workforce and within the company.
Transport: We reimburse subscriptions or provide transport on certain routes.
Professional Development: We offer numerous development opportunities.
Teambuilding and Relaxation Events: We organize teambuilding and relaxation events.
Relaxation Area: We have a relaxation area in the company courtyard.
Diversity and Multicultural Mindset: We encourage you to join our team, no matter who you are or where you come from.

How You Will Create An Impact 📈


Develop and implement data science and AI models for industrial use cases
Translate business problems into analytical approaches and solutions
Perform data exploration, preparation, and feature engineering
Work with Data Engineers to ensure availability and usability of data
Collaborate with business stakeholders to ensure relevance and impact
Support the deployment of models into production environments
Monitor and improve model performance over time
Contribute to the development of scalable AI capabilities and best practices
Communicate results and insights in a clear and business-oriented way


What Are We Looking For 🔎


Degree in Data Science, Mathematics, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
Several years of experience in data science, machine learning, or applied analytics
Strong programming skills (e.g., Python, SQL)
Experience with machine learning and statistical modeling
Familiarity with industrial or operational data is a strong plus
Experience with model deployment and MLOps concepts is beneficial
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work in cross-functional teams
Strong communication skills and business understanding


What We Offer


Opportunity to work on high-impact industrial use cases
Build and shape Data & AI capabilities from the ground up
Close collaboration with engineering, manufacturing, and business teams
High level of ownership and visibility
A dynamic environment with room for innovation and growth


Salary transparency


This role is classified within an internal grading and salary band system, based on objective criteria such as responsibilities, competencies, and job complexity. The offered salary is aligned with this structure.
We do not request or take into account candidates’ salary history.
The selection process is based on skills and experience


If you value a dynamic, growing and intercultural environment and enjoy hands-on work, then become part of the SGB-SMIT Group and transform with us the future of energy. ⚡

We are looking forward to your application!

  • The selection process is based on skills and experience

If you value a dynamic, growing and intercultural environment and enjoy hands-on work, then become part of the SGB-SMIT Group and transform with us the future of energy. ⚡

We are looking forward to your application!

Offering both public and private charging points, EVIO ensures accessibility via an easy-to-use global app.

Title: AI / Data Engineer
Description:
Summary
At Apple, new ideas have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job, and there’s no telling what you could accomplish.

Description
We are looking for a strong AI / Data Engineer to join our EMEIA Supply Chain team. This role focuses on building AI-powered applications, scalable backend systems, and Generative AI solutions that solve real operational problems across supply chain and logistics.

You will work across modern AI engineering, prompt engineering, and intelligent application development, helping design the next generation of AI tools and data capabilities used by Operations teams across EMEIA.

If you are passionate about AI, data platforms, and solving complex supply chain challenges at scale, we’d love to hear from you.

Responsibilities

Develop AI-powered applications and workflows leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, RAG architectures, and agent-based AI solutions.
Design and build agentic AI capabilities including multi-agent workflows, orchestration patterns, tool integrations, memory/context handling, and intelligent automation solutions for Supply Chain and Operations use cases.
Build and optimise backend AI and data services using technologies such as Snowflake, Airflow, Python, and related cloud tooling.
Develop and refine prompts, system instructions, context management strategies, and AI evaluation methodologies to improve the quality, reliability, and consistency of AI-generated outputs.
Work closely with Supply Chain and Operations teams to understand business challenges and deliver scalable AI and analytics solutions.
Support the deployment and operationalisation of AI solutions including monitoring, testing, governance, and continuous improvement.
Contribute to team-wide best practices around AI engineering, data engineering, and modern software development.
Build APIs, tools, and lightweight applications that enable business users to consume data and AI capabilities more effectively.


Minimum Qualifications

Progressive experience in data engineering, AI engineering, machine learning infrastructure, or a related technical field.
Strong programming skills in Python and SQL, with experience building scalable ETL/ELT pipelines and working with large-scale datasets.
Hands on experience with modern data platforms and distributed processing technologies such as Snowflake, Spark, Kafka, Airflow, dbt, or equivalent technologies.
Experience working with Large Language Models (LLMs), including prompt engineering, agentic AI workflows, and AI application development.
Exposure to application frameworks such as FastAPI, Flask, Streamlit, or React.
Strong understanding of data architecture, APIs, and scalable system design.
Ability to communicate technical solutions clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.


Preferred Qualifications

Experience building AI evaluation platforms covering hallucination detection, retrieval quality evaluation, groundedness scoring, prompt benchmarking, and model comparison testing.
Experience designing enterprise AI solutions using MCP architectures, knowledge graphs, or semantic data products.
Demonstrated interest in emerging AI technologies, evidenced through applied projects, research, or professional experience within enterprise or operational environments.
BSc or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Engineering, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related technical field.
MSc or equivalent advanced experience in AI, Machine Learning, Data Engineering, or a quantitative discipline is preferred but not required.
Certifications in cloud platforms, AI engineering, or Generative AI technologies.


At Apple, we believe accessibility is a fundamental human right. You’ll find that idea reflected in everything here — in our culture, our benefits and our digital tools. By welcoming as many perspectives as possible, we help you build a career where you feel like you belong.

Learn about accessibility in Apple’s workplace

Title: AI/Data Engineer (m/ž)
Description:
Pročitao/la si naslov oglasa?

Želiš stvarati više, želiš da ti se tvoj rad prizna, želiš imati osobni napredak?

Ako je odgovor na sve da, čitaj dalje oglas, ako nije čitaj druge oglase.




Osoba si koja želi stvarati dodatne vrijednosti, voli raditi u dinamičnom i podržavajućem okruženju, mi smo pravi tim za tebe!

Tvoj idući korak: Pročitaj oglas do kraja i javi nam se za neformalni razgovor u Agilos IT.

Naš moto je win-win-win, jer želimo da su svi zadovoljni – ti, klijent, i mi.

Na razgovoru ćemo otvoreno pričati o najboljim i najlošijim stvarima kod nas jer igramo s potpuno otvorenim kartama. Isto očekujemo i od tebe.

 

Tehnički zahtjevi:

1. Programski jezici:

Python – Izvrsno poznavanje s naglaskom na implementaciju AI rješenja.
SQL

2. Biblioteke i alati za obradu podataka:

NumPy, Pandas – Iskustvo u radu s numeričkim i tabličnim podacima, obradi i preprocesiranju.
Scikit-learn – Razumijevanje metoda za preprocesiranje, treniranje i evaluaciju modela.

3. Duboko učenje i neuronske mreže:

TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras – Rad s popularnim frameworkovima za implementaciju, treniranje i evaluaciju deep learning modela.
Iskustvo u izgradnji i optimizaciji modela dubokog učenja (npr. CNN, RNN, transformers).
Znanje o treniranju Large Language Models (LLM) i njihovom finetuningu.

4. Razumijevanje i iskustvo u modelima učenja:

Iskustvo s različitim vrstama učenja ( reinforcement, transfer learning).
Razumijevanje tehnika evaluacije modela za klasifikaciju i regresiju (preciznost, RMSE, F1-score, AUC, ROC).
Analiza treniranja modela za praćenje učinkovitosti i prepoznavanje problema poput overfittinga.
Korištenje metoda za prevenciju overfittinga (early stopping, regularizacija L1/L2, dropout, cross-validacija).

5. Računalni resursi i infrastruktura:

Iskustvo u optimizaciji modela za okruženja s visokim performansama (korištenje GPU-a, distribuirano učenje).

 

Što očekujemo od tebe:

Snažnu želju za istraživanjem i implementacijom inovativnih AI/ML rješenja.
Proaktivnost i samostalnost u rješavanju tehničkih izazova.
Spremnost na dijeljenje znanja i rad u multidisciplinarnom timu.
Izvrsne analitičke vještine i sposobnost interpretacije rezultata.

 

Što nudimo:

Konkurentnu plaću uz bonuse i priznanja (mogućnost bonusa do 4x bruto plaće).
Priliku za rad na izazovnim i inovativnim projektima koji oblikuju budućnost.
Podršku na svakom koraku – kolege, voditelji i direktor brinu da ti bude dobro.
Iskrenu i otvorenu komunikaciju – feedback kod nas nije opcija, već prilika.
Moderno radno okruženje: vrhunska oprema, fleksibilno radno vrijeme, besplatno iće i piće, druženja, team building aktivnosti, treninzi i više.
Zdraviji način života: Fitness podrška i poticanje zdravih navika.
Zabava nakon posla: Board game liga, roštilji na Bundeku, paintball, ručkovi petkom.

 

Zašto raditi s nama?

Naša atmosfera je nešto na što smo jako ponosni – uvijek pomažemo jedni drugima. Kada padneš, imaš nekoliko ruku koje će te podići.

Postani dio naše Agilos IT zajednice i pridruži se timu koji ne samo da voli svoj posao, nego i uživa u njemu!

 

Javi se na:

 jobs@agilosit.com

U naslov maila napiši: AI/Data Engineer - [Tvoje Ime]

Zajedno stvarajmo rješenja budućnosti!

Title: Data Scientist (Sales & Marketing Focus)
Description:
Do you have the required Data Science skills to drive real impact at one of the most recognisable brands globally?

You'll contribute to Global Data Science projects to enable business stakeholders from various departments incl. (Sales, Marketing, HR) to make better data-driven decisions. The Data Scientist will work closely with other team members to build and run data products, apply statistical analyses to solve business problems that generate impact, and create convincing presentations to demonstrate said impact to the wider organisation.You'll also be responsible for innovation by introducing new data-driven business ideas, new statistical methods, new data products, or by supporting new business processes.

All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:

DELIVER PROJECTS PART OF EXISTING DATA SCIENCE SERVICE LINES

You will support the team by efficiently managing, running, and delivering Data Science projects with a key focus on our Sales, Marketing and HR stakeholders. This end-to-end approach includes everything from project scoping, execution, quality assurance, and delivery via convincing presentations.

SCALE EXISTING DATA SCIENCE INITIATIVES

You will work together closely with IT colleagues to find efficiencies allowing us to scale our initiatives to more people and more Red Bull markets.

DRIVE INNOVATION

Not focusing exclusively on existing service lines and initiatives, you'll actively think along and propose new ways of generating even more value for our stakeholders.

MANAGE EXTERNAL CONSULTANTS

You'll manage our external colleagues and guide them to deliver Data Science projects in an efficient manner, ensuring top notch quality.

STAKEHOLDER MANAGEMENT

You'll build close relationships with internal and external stakeholders. Thanks to your collaborative attitude and ability to absorb constructive feedback, you'll maximise the likelihood of making each and every Data Science initiative a success for the company.

Support The Data Science Manager With Core Responsibilities

You'll work inside the Data Science Team and will support them with impact tracking, projects, pipeline planning, preparing materials for the planning cycles, internal trainings, onboarding new colleagues, internal and external outreach and more.

Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:


2+ Years of professional experience as a Data Scientist or similar role.
Programming: knowledge and practical experience with both Python and SQL. Snowflake is a plus.
FMCG Knowledge: prior experience working at an FMCG company in a data or analytics focused role a plus.
Data Literacy: ability to prepare datasets ensuring top quality such that essence of said data and the implications for the problem at hand can be grasped quickly.
Statistical Reasoning: applied understanding of Stats and Probability and know how to use these tools to reduce uncertainty in a business context (regression, visualisation).
Technical Literacy: applied understanding of modern computing allows the candidate to do things which go beyond the strict definition of Data Science (git, API calls, web crawling, …).
Data Tooling: experience with version control (e.g., Git), familiarity with data transformation tools (e.g., dbt) and exposure to lightweight application frameworks (e.g., Streamlit, Shiny) is a plus.
Presentation Skills: present coherent data stories at the appropriate level of abstraction given the audience.
Stakeholder Management: good at building mutually beneficial connections with functional stakeholders.
Pragmatic Critical Thinking: intuitively consider relevant costs/benefits in all decisions and act accordingly.
Outcome Driven: highly motivated to add value and to demonstrate that impact to the organisation.
Scientific Reasoning/Scoping: ability to define and formulate new questions, in addition to answering given ones.
Grit: proven capability to see things through to the end even if initial feedback is discouraging.


Due to legal reasons, we are obliged to disclose the minimum salary according to the collective agreement for this position, which is EUR 2,504 gross per month. However, our attractive compensation package is based on market-oriented salaries and is therefore significantly above the stated minimum salary.

As an employer, we value diversity and support people in developing their potential and strengths, realizing their ideas and seizing opportunities. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, skin colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation or origin.

The Data Scientist will work closely with other team members to build and run data products, apply statistical analyses to solve business problems that generate impact, and create convincing presentations to demonstrate said impact to the wider organisation.You'll also be responsible for innovation by introducing new data-driven business ideas, new statistical methods, new data products, or by supporting new business processes.

All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:

DELIVER PROJECTS PART OF EXISTING DATA SCIENCE SERVICE LINES

You will support the team by efficiently managing, running, and delivering Data Science projects with a key focus on our Sales, Marketing and HR stakeholders. This end-to-end approach includes everything from project scoping, execution, quality assurance, and delivery via convincing presentations.

SCALE EXISTING DATA SCIENCE INITIATIVES

You will work together closely with IT colleagues to find efficiencies allowing us to scale our initiatives to more people and more Red Bull markets.

DRIVE INNOVATION

Not focusing exclusively on existing service lines and initiatives, you'll actively think along and propose new ways of generating even more value for our stakeholders.

MANAGE EXTERNAL CONSULTANTS

You'll manage our external colleagues and guide them to deliver Data Science projects in an efficient manner, ensuring top notch quality.

STAKEHOLDER MANAGEMENT

You'll build close relationships with internal and external stakeholders. Thanks to your collaborative attitude and ability to absorb constructive feedback, you'll maximise the likelihood of making each and every Data Science initiative a success for the company.

Support The Data Science Manager With Core Responsibilities

You'll work inside the Data Science Team and will support them with impact tracking, projects, pipeline planning, preparing materials for the planning cycles, internal trainings, onboarding new colleagues, internal and external outreach and more.

Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:

  • 2+ Years of professional experience as a Data Scientist or similar role.
  • Programming: knowledge and practical experience with both Python and SQL. Snowflake is a plus.
  • FMCG Knowledge: prior experience working at an FMCG company in a data or analytics focused role a plus.
  • Data Literacy: ability to prepare datasets ensuring top quality such that essence of said data and the implications for the problem at hand can be grasped quickly.
  • Statistical Reasoning: applied understanding of Stats and Probability and know how to use these tools to reduce uncertainty in a business context (regression, visualisation).
  • Technical Literacy: applied understanding of modern computing allows the candidate to do things which go beyond the strict definition of Data Science (git, API calls, web crawling, …).
  • Data Tooling: experience with version control (e.g., Git), familiarity with data transformation tools (e.g., dbt) and exposure to lightweight application frameworks (e.g., Streamlit, Shiny) is a plus.
  • Presentation Skills: present coherent data stories at the appropriate level of abstraction given the audience.
  • Stakeholder Management: good at building mutually beneficial connections with functional stakeholders.
  • Pragmatic Critical Thinking: intuitively consider relevant costs/benefits in all decisions and act accordingly.
  • Outcome Driven: highly motivated to add value and to demonstrate that impact to the organisation.
  • Scientific Reasoning/Scoping: ability to define and formulate new questions, in addition to answering given ones.
  • Grit: proven capability to see things through to the end even if initial feedback is discouraging.

Due to legal reasons, we are obliged to disclose the minimum salary according to the collective agreement for this position, which is EUR 2,504 gross per month. However, our attractive compensation package is based on market-oriented salaries and is therefore significantly above the stated minimum salary.

As an employer, we value diversity and support people in developing their potential and strengths, realizing their ideas and seizing opportunities. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, skin colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation or origin.

Title: Data Scientist (Junior/Mid)
Description:
Fourth is the world’s largest and fastest-growing global leader of end-to-end restaurant and hospitality management technology solutions. We pride ourselves on delivering a world-class SaaS experience for our clients by building long term partnerships starting from the first phone call. We know our recipe for success at Fourth is our amazing team... and that starts with hiring the right people!

Interested in joining our smart, fun, and talented team?

Position Overview

The Data Scientist will be an integral part of the Data Science Team at Fourth. The role fits into our broader team together with ML Engineers, Data Engineers and Data Analysts.

The focus will be to build data-powered solutions forming part of our product. Such solutions are typically linked to demand prediction, labor prediction, inventory and intra-day planning. The main purpose of the Data Scientist is to define and execute data science experiments, to create PoC and to move them to production with support from ML and Data Engineers.

Most of the work is done in Python (with various packages and extensions: pandas, sklearn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn etc.).

Your daily job will include:


Exploratory data analysis
Feature engineering
Time series forecasting
Model development, deployment and monitoring
A/B testing
Using strong business acumen, as well as the ability to communicate findings and mine vast amounts of data for useful insights
Using these insights to influence how an organisation approaches business challenges
Applying a combined knowledge of computer science, modelling, statistics, analytics and maths to solve problems
Sifting and analysing data from multiple angles, looking for trends that highlight problems or opportunities
Communicating important information and insights to business and IT leaders
Making recommendations to adapt existing business strategies


Experience and competencies needed:


Strong statistical and machine learning knowledge
Use AI tools for coding and strong coding skills (clean and commented code, version control, documentation)
Ability to develop high-performing end-to-end machine learning models (data processing, feature engineering, model training, scoring, monitoring)
Experience with feature engineering using Python, SQL or similar tools
Experience with machine learning using Python, Spark, PyTorch, scikit-learn or similar languages and libraries
Abilities to create powerful visualisations which to help communication of data science insights and results to business stakeholders


Nice to have (not required):


Knowledge of or hands-on experience with Large Language Models (LLMs) and prompt engineering
Exposure to agentic AI concepts and frameworks (e.g. LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen or similar)
Experience building or working with AI agents and multi-step reasoning pipelines


Juniors are welcome to apply - we value curiosity, a strong learning mindset and solid fundamentals over years of experience.

Benefits and Culture:


25+ days off, as well as birthday day off and 4 charity days off per year
Flexible start and end of the working day and hybrid working mode, including a combination remote and in the office
Team-centric atmosphere
Encouraging healthy lifestyle and work-life balance including supplemental health insurance
New parents bonus scheme
Only short-listed candidates will be contacted. All personal data provided by you in your application will be processed by Fourth Bulgaria EOOD, UIC 203576042, solely for our recruitment purposes. If you do not provide your personal data, Fourth Bulgaria EOOD will not be able to review your application. Fourth Bulgaria will transfer your personal data only within its corporate group and to companies which provide recruitment support to Fourth Bulgaria. Fourth Bulgaria will ensure you can exercise your rights to access, correction and erasure of your personal data. More information on Fourth Bulgaria’s privacy policy for job candidates is available here and by applying you confirm that you have read it.


Our Story

In July 2019 Fourth joined forces with HotSchedules to become the global leader in end-to-end restaurant and hospitality management technology solutions. Together, the merged company now represents the world’s largest and only provider of end-to-end restaurant and hospitality management solutions for customers across the globe and of all sizes—from a single location or franchisee restaurant to a global restaurant or hotel chain. The combined company’s complete software-as-service (SaaS) solution suite including scheduling, time & attendance, applicant tracking, training, inventory management / procurement, HR / benefits and payroll services now serves customers in 120,000 locations worldwide and is supported by a dedicated, unified team across offices in the US, UK, Bulgaria, China, Australia, and UAE.

Fourth is an Equal Opportunity Employer

All qualified applicants will receive consideration without discrimination because of sex, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, race, color, age, national origin, military status, religion, or disability or any other legally protected status.

Title: Data Scientist (m/w/d)
Description:
Bei AltaSigma entwickeln wir eine Enterprise-AI-Plattform, die in Europa neue Maßstäbe setzt. Unsere Mission: Künstliche Intelligenz für Organisationen jeder Größe schnell, sicher und mit messbarem Nutzen einsetzbar zu machen.

Mit unserer Plattform, die konsequent auf Datensouveränität ausgelegt ist, können Unternehmen das volle Spektrum moderner KI produktiv nutzen - von klassischem Machine Learning und Deep Learning über Time-Series- und Forecasting-Modelle bis hin zu Large Language Models, RAG-Systemen und Agentic AI. Über unser integriertes Data Lakehouse, robuste ML-Pipelines und PrivateGPT-basierte Anwendungen schaffen wir eine einheitliche Sicht über alle Geschäftsprozesse hinweg - mit einem spürbaren Innovations- und Produktivitätsschub.




Als technologiegetriebenes, wachsendes Unternehmen setzen wir neue Standards für Enterprise AI - modular, sicher, sofort einsatzbereit und zu 100 % „Made in Germany". Wenn Du Lust hast, diese Zukunft aktiv mitzugestalten, bist Du bei uns genau richtig.

Als Data Scientist (m/w/d) wirst Du Teil eines Teams, das Modelle nicht nur entwickelt, sondern in produktive KI-Lösungen überführt - von der ersten Idee bis zum Deployment auf unserer Plattform.




Woran Du arbeitest

Vom Problem zur passenden Methode: Du durchdringst fachliche Problemstellungen, wählst die passende Methode aus dem vollen Spektrum moderner KI - von klassischem ML und Deep Learning über Time-Series-Modelle bis zu LLMs, RAG-Systemen und Agentic AI - und entwickelst moderne Lösungen.
Du arbeitest auf unserer Enterprise-AI-Plattform - und gestaltest mit, wohin sie sich weiterentwickelt.
Du baust die dazu nötigen Daten- und ML-Pipelines so, dass sie im Produktivbetrieb stabil laufen - inklusive Training, Deployment, Monitoring und Retraining.
Du sorgst dafür, dass das, was Du baust, nicht nur für einen Kunden funktioniert: Gute Lösungen werden zu wiederverwendbaren Komponenten der AltaSigma-Plattform.
Du gestaltest die Weiterentwicklung unserer AutoML- und MLOps-Komponenten und automatisierst End-to-End-ML-Workflows.
Du verantwortest Deine Projekte fachlich im Team - von der methodischen Konzeption über die Modellierung bis zur Ergebnispräsentation vor unseren Kunden.




Was Du mitbringst

Abgeschlossenes Studium in Informatik, Mathematik, Physik oder einem vergleichbaren Bereich.
Praxiserfahrung als Data Scientist - Du hast Modelle nicht nur entworfen, sondern auch in Produktion gebracht und weißt, worauf es dabei ankommt.
Sicherer Umgang mit unserem Tech-Stack: Python, PyTorch und PySpark sind für Dich Alltag, gerne mit Erfahrung in modernen Lakehouse-Formaten wie Delta oder Iceberg.
Fundiertes Wissen in Machine Learning, Deep Learning sowie aktuellen Entwicklungen rund um LLMs und Agent-Systeme - Du weißt, wann welcher Ansatz passt und wo seine Grenzen liegen.
Cloud-Erfahrung mit AWS, Azure oder GCP ist ein Plus - AltaSigma selbst ist cloud-agnostisch.
Eine schnelle Auffassungsgabe, mit der Du Dich zügig in fachliche Herausforderungen unserer Kunden einarbeiten kannst.
Ein gutes Gespür dafür, wie man komplexe technische Themen klar formuliert und überzeugend präsentiert. 
Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse.
Den Anspruch, Verantwortung zu übernehmen, mit eigenen Ideen mitzugestalten und Vorhaben ins Ziel zu bringen.




Was Du bei uns findest

Echte Gestaltungsmöglichkeiten. Du übernimmst Themen, prägst Methoden und entscheidest mit, wie wir Lösungen entwickeln.
Ein Tech-Umfeld, das Spaß macht. Vom klassischen ML bis zu Agentic AI - die Themenbreite ist groß, und Du entscheidest mit, welcher Ansatz für welches Problem am besten passt.
Werkzeuge, die Du Dir selbst aussuchst. Hardware, Betriebssystem, IDE, Tools - Du wählst, was zu Dir und Deiner Arbeitsweise passt.
Räume zum Wachsen. Trainings, Zertifizierungen und Konferenzen - wir unterstützen Dich aktiv dabei, Dich fachlich weiterzuentwickeln.
Ein Büro, in dem man gerne ist. Standorte in Ulm, Stuttgart und Berlin, jeweils in zentraler Lage.
Attraktives Gehalt mit Bonusvereinbarung - ein Gesamtpaket, das zu Deiner Erfahrung passt.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
MWDN is a global IT outstaffing company with 23+ years of experience that connects exceptional tech talent with leading companies across Israel, the USA, Great Britain, and Western Europe. We offer opportunities to work on international products in a stable and professional environment.

Why does MWDN rock?:

Here’s what you can expect when you join MWDN:


Security: We carefully vet our clients to minimize risks and ensure reliability and timely payments - no fraud or unpleasant surprises.
Career support: If a project isn’t the right fit, we support you and actively help find new opportunities that match your skills and career goals.
Legal assistance: We provide guidance on legal matters, including opening and managing your independent contractor or sole proprietorship status, taxes, and related processes.
Professional development: We offer English courses and professional growth opportunities, as well as team-building events.


Why choose us? MWDN is ranked among the top 5 IT employers in our region according to DOU. We take pride in our transparency and strong commitment to our team. Curious to learn more? See what our employees say about working with us on DOU.

What is your new project?:

Domain: InsurTech

Location: Israel, California

Company size: 11-50 employees

Founded in: 2016

What makes this project exciting?:

Fast-growing InsurTech start-up building an innovative AI, Machine Learning platform aiming to change the life insurance industry. They are helping insurers to become data-driven and produce insights to inform decision-making and drive new business strategies at the corporate level.

They're growing and looking for a self-motivated individual with strong technical skills to work in a fast-paced environment on our Python Backend Development team. As part of this team, you’ll take an active role in developing AI-based data science platform and get a chance to work with cutting-edge technologies including.

What Makes You a Great Fit


+3 years professional experience in Machine Learning
BSc in Computer Science / Mathematics / Statistics / Physics or equivalent (MSc / PhD - advantage)
Proficiency in Python and SQL
Industry experience from inception to production of ML models (such as time series, clustering, regression and classification algorithms)
Experience in Insurance or Fintech
Strong skills in data exploration, analysis, and visualization
Team player, positive attitude, collaborative, good communication skills
Strong problem-solving skills, with experience breaking down a large problem into smaller, manageable components


It Will Also Be Great If You Have


Experience working with reporting tools such as PowerBi/Tableau


Your Day-to-day In This Position


End to end data science cycle: designing, training, implementing, evaluating and monitoring machine learning models
Customer Churn Model, Forecasting, Segmentation, Classification and Regression
Collaborate with product managers and customers to understand business needs and build solutions together
Effectively identify and apply analytics, causal inference, experimentation, and machine learning techniques for given business problems
Present your research and insights to all levels of the company (English is a must)


Why work with us?:


People-first management with minimal bureaucracy
A friendly company culture, proven by employees who choose to return
Flexible working hours
29 days of PTO (18 working days per year pluse all national holidays)
10 paid recovery days
Full financial and legal support for independent contractors
Free English classes, with native speakers or Ukrainian teachers
Dedicated HR support


Our Next Steps

✅ Intro call with a Recruiter — ✅ Intro with the client — ✅ Tech interview — ✅ Final client interview— ✅ Offer

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Data Scientist




We bouwen met Just Good People een nextgen data team met leuke mensen met sterke data, AI, human & biz skills. Geen PPT-consultancy, maar datakansen kraken en echt waarde realiseren bij toffe klanten. En veel opleiding.




Zie jij in bergen info – naast getallen – vooral kansen? Wil je die liever omzetten in actie dan in rapporten die in een la verdwijnen?




Wil je maximaal leren door in korte tijd bij meerdere bedrijven in de keuken te kijken? Terwijl wij je helpen ontwikkelen op het snijvlak van data, business en people?




Dan hebben we de uitdaging voor jou.




🟡 Just Good People

Bij JGP hebben we twee simpele regels: We nemen goede mensen aan. En we zorgen goed voor deze mensen. Dat betekent dat we samen optrekken om jou maximaal in je kracht te krijgen op een manier die bij jou past.







🌱 Unieke data filosofie

“As machines get better at being machines, humans have to get better at being more human.”

Deze nieuwe tijd vraagt om een nieuw soort data professional. Bij Just Good People Data helpen we bedrijven versnellen met top notch data professionals met goed ontwikkelde data, business én human skills. En trainen je naar nog hoger niveau. Met aandacht voor:




Volgende levels in Data | AI
“Waarde denken” voor klanten/ gebruikers
Stakeholder management
Communiceren & inspireren







⚡ Wat je gaat doen

Je werkt aan projecten bij mooie bedrijven zoals Bol.com, Defensie, Action, Rabo, NS, AMC, ASML, Essent.




Denk aan:




Maken van impact met data & AI
Stakeholders meenemen in de kracht van data – op een begrijpelijke manier
Verbinden van mensen, processen en tech
Ontwikkelen van voorspellende modellen, AI-oplossingen en slimme algoritmes
Experimenteren, leren en continu verbeteren op basis van data
Vertalen van complexe analyses naar heldere adviezen en concrete acties







👩 Wie je bent




Je bent technisch sterk maar ook nieuwsgierig naar de mens achter de vraag
Je hebt ervaring met machine learning, statistische modellering of AI-toepassingen
Je vindt het leuk om complexe vraagstukken simpel te maken
Je krijgt energie van verandering en nieuwe omgevingen
Je wilt blijven groeien in data, business én human skills
Je hebt 4+ jaar ervaring als Data Scientist
Je hebt een WO-opleiding, bijvoorbeeld in Data Science of Econometrie
Je bent ondernemend en denkt in zowel risico’s als kansen
Je schakelt gemakkelijk tussen strategie, business en data
Je durft vragen te stellen en bestaande werkwijzen uit te dagen
Je bent een echte teamspeler en communicatief sterk
Je spreekt en schrijft vloeiend Nederlands en Engels







🚀 Dit ga je krijgen

Vast dienstverband met goed salaris, bonusregeling en aantrekkelijke voorwaarden
Veel persoonlijke aandacht voor (waarde) groei, inzetbaarheid en “in je kracht komen“ als data professional. Met ook data-inhoudelijke mentoring.
Opleiding en kruisbestuiving met andere professionals in state of the art AI skills
De kans om in diverse keukens te kijken en veel te leren
Leaseauto of NS-Businesscard (ook privégebruik)
Gezellige borrels, kennissessies en team-events
Collega’s die naast slimme analyses ook goed zijn in slechte grappen




Wij zoeken goede data-mensen, die goede dingen doen. Van die types die je er gewoon heel graag bij wil hebben – net zo goed met mensen als met code!

Title: Mid Data Scientist – AI Solutions
Description:
About Us




At WITSIDE, we unleash the power of data to transform lives and businesses. As passionate data scientists, engineers, and analysts, we partner with our clients to drive innovation and optimize performance. We specialize in data management, data visualization, advanced analytics, and data analytics consulting, helping our clients make informed decisions and uncover valuable insights. Join us to turn every insight into action and every challenge into an opportunity. Together, we will uncover the intelligent side of things and create solutions that make a difference.




Role Overview




We are looking for a Mid Data Scientist to join our AI team and contribute to the development of advanced analytics, machine learning and AI-driven solutions that help organizations make smarter, data-driven decisions. In this role, you will work closely with Data Engineers, Analysts, Architects and business stakeholders to transform data into actionable insights, predictive models and AI-powered solutions with measurable business value.

﻿This role is ideal for a hands-on Data Scientist who can translate business challenges into analytical solutions and contribute to AI, ML and advanced analytics projects across internal and client engagements.




Why Join WITSIDE




Work on real Data & AI projects across several industries and business domains.
Contribute to AI-powered solutions that help clients improve decisions, operations and performance.
Develop both technical and business skills in a modern, supportive and innovation-driven environment.
Collaborate with experienced professionals in Data Engineering, Business Intelligence, Architecture and Applied AI.




Key Responsibilities




Data Analysis & Insights: Analyze structured and unstructured data to identify trends, patterns and actionable business insights that support strategic and operational decision-making.
Data Preparation & Feature Engineering: Support data collection, cleansing, transformation and feature engineering activities to ensure high-quality datasets for analytics and AI initiatives.
Machine Learning & Predictive Modeling: Develop, train, evaluate and optimize machine learning and statistical models for predictive analytics, forecasting, classification and recommendation use cases.
AI & Advanced Analytics Solutions: Contribute to the design and implementation of AI/ML solutions, automation initiatives and advanced analytics projects aligned with business objectives, including exposure to Generative AI and AI-driven automation concepts.
Stakeholder Communication: Translate business needs into analytical approaches and communicate findings, recommendations and model outcomes to technical and non-technical stakeholders, including client-facing audiences where needed.
Collaboration & Continuous Improvement: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve analytical processes, model performance and data-driven capabilities and communicate analytical findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.




Required Qualifications & Experience




2-5 years of experience in Data Science, Advanced Analytics, Machine Learning or a related role.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, Information Technology or a related field.
Strong understanding of statistics, machine learning algorithms and lifecycle process including training, validation, evaluation and deployment concepts.
Hands-on experience with Python and commonly used data science libraries such as Pandas, NumPy and Scikit-learn.
Hands-on experience with Generative AI / LLM concepts such as prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) or fine-tuning.
Very Good understanding of SQL and relational databases.
Ability to translate business problems into analytical approaches and communicate insights in a clear, practical and business-oriented way.
Experience working with cross-functional teams and collaborating with technical and business stakeholders.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in both Greek and English.
Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills and a collaborative mindset.
Eagerness for continuous learning and professional development in Data Science and AI technologies.




Nice to Have




Master’s degree in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering or a related field.
Familiarity with TensorFlow, PyTorch or similar machine learning frameworks.
Understanding of MLOps concepts.
Familiarity with Git or other version control systems.
Good experience with cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS or GCP.
Exposure to notebooks and collaborative analytics environments such as Jupyter or Databricks.
Familiarity with data visualization and reporting tools.
Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies.
Experience supporting or guiding junior team members is considered a plus.




What We Offer




Competitive salary and benefits, including a private pension plan, medical coverage and a monthly Ticket Restaurant Card.
Performance incentives such as annual bonuses and extra paid holidays.
Work-life balance with hybrid working options, extended remote periods and flexible hours.
Professional growth opportunities with an annual allowance for training and certifications, plus access to the latest tools and technologies.
Engaging work environment with diverse projects, a collaborative culture and team activities/offsites.




How to Apply




If you share our passion for making data-driven decisions and fostering growth, we want you on our team. Please apply through LinkedIn, and your application will be treated in confidence. WITSIDE is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Overview

At Lutron, we are transforming how people experience light through intelligent, connected lighting devices and systems. As a Data Scientist, you will apply data science, analytics, machine learning, and AI to help improve customer experiences, products, and business operations. You will work closely with senior data scientists, engineers, product managers, and business partners to turn data into actionable insights and deploy models into production.

Responsibilities


Contribute to end-to-end data science projects that improve product performance, customer experience, and operational efficiency, applying your strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Translate business questions into analytical approaches with clear metrics and success criteria,
Develop, test, and validate machine learning models and statistical analyses under guidance from senior team members
Partner with engineering and product teams to support deployment of models and analytics into production systems
Apply best practices in data cleaning, feature engineering, model evaluation, and documentation
Communicate findings, insights, and technical concepts clearly and effectively to technical and non-technical stakeholders
Continuously learn and apply new data science and machine learning techniques relevant to Lutron’s products and business


Qualifications


Graduate degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field
Minimum, cumulative GPA of 3.00 for all degrees earned
4+ years of hands-on experience in data science, analytics, or machine learning
Proficiency in Python or R, with working knowledge of SQL
Familiarity with common machine learning techniques such as regression, classification, clustering, and time series analysis
Experience using ML libraries such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar


Desired Qualifications


Experience deploying models into production environments
Exposure to cloud services from AWS, Azure, or similar providers
Experience working with IoT or sensor data
Familiarity with Agile development practices


Starting pay: $120,000 - $135,000 per year; Lutron's employee benefits include 401k match, health, dental, and life insurance, paid vacation (amount based on tenure with the company), flexible spending accounts, and tuition reimbursement programs. "

Lutron Electronics’ position as the worldwide leader in innovative lighting control and shading solutions has enabled consistent, annual growth. Our company has cultivated a reputation of unsurpassed quality, a broad range of technologies and product offerings, and a strong commitment to servicing our worldwide customers. This has allowed the company to invest in developing new technologies and services, expand our technical capabilities and global presence, and to find and retain the best talent. Build your career with Lutron where you will enjoy competitive compensation and benefits while exploring many options for continued growth and education. Make a difference every day in our dynamic, people-centric, technology-driven organization. For more information, view our website at www.lutron.com.

Lutron Electronics is an Equal Opportunity – Affirmative Action – Employer. We welcome qualified, motivated applicants regardless of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics

Veronica
